content.text:
I see the issue! You're in an async function (`updatedata()`), but `Layers_Drawing_Async()` is a `Sub` (void), not an awaitable `Function`. You cannot `Await` a `Sub` in VB.NET.

Let me create a **true async version** that returns a `Task` so you can properly await it:

input.old_string:
'◘ ASYNC VERSION - Uses BackgroundWorker for better performance with large layer counts (50+ layers)
    Public Sub Layers_Drawing_Async()
        'Prevent multiple concurrent drawing operations
        If isLayerDrawingInProgress Then
            Return
        End If

        'Start background work
        If Not layerDrawingWorker.IsBusy Then
            isLayerDrawingInProgress = True
            'Optional: Show loading indicator
            'pnlLayers.Visible = False
            layerDrawingWorker.RunWorkerAsync()
        End If
    End Sub
input.new_string:
'◘ ASYNC VERSION - Uses BackgroundWorker for better performance with large layer counts (50+ layers)
    '  This version does NOT return a Task (fire-and-forget)
    Public Sub Layers_Drawing_Async()
        'Prevent multiple concurrent drawing operations
        If isLayerDrawingInProgress Then
            Return
        End If

        'Start background work
        If Not layerDrawingWorker.IsBusy Then
            isLayerDrawingInProgress = True
            'Optional: Show loading indicator
            'pnlLayers.Visible = False
            layerDrawingWorker.RunWorkerAsync()
        End If
    End Sub

    '◘ AWAITABLE ASYNC VERSION - Returns Task for proper async/await support
    Public Async Function Layers_Drawing_AsyncTask() As Task
        Try
            '◘ Run calculations in background thread
            Dim controlsData As List(Of LayerControlData) = Await Task.Run(Function()
                '◘ Calculate all layer data in background thread
                Dim layersqty As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersQty - ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersEmptyBottom - ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersEmptyTop
                Dim qtybuild As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty
                Dim lyuin As Integer = ExData.UnitsByLayer

                Dim layescompletes As Integer = 1
                Try
                    layescompletes = Math.Floor(qtybuild / ExData.UnitsByLayer)
                Catch
                End Try

                Dim height As Integer = 140
                Dim picqty As Integer = layersqty + 2
                Dim pich As Integer = Math.Floor(height / picqty)
                Dim maxlocy As Integer = height - pich - pich

                '◘ Prepare list of controls to create
                Dim controlsToCreate As New List(Of LayerControlData)
                Dim ly1f As Boolean = False

                '◘ First layer
                If layersqty > 1 Then
                    ly1f = True
                    Dim imageRes As Image = If(layescompletes >= 1, My.Resources.lay_dwn_hole_v, My.Resources.lay_dwn_hole_b)
                    controlsToCreate.Add(New LayerControlData With {
                        .ImageResource = imageRes,
                        .Height = pich * 2,
                        .LocationY = maxlocy
                    })
                Else
                    Dim imageRes As Image
                    If layescompletes >= 1 Then
                        imageRes = My.Resources.lay_dwn_nhole_v
                        ly1f = True
                    Else
                        ly1f = False
                        imageRes = My.Resources.lay_dwn_nhole_b
                    End If
                    controlsToCreate.Add(New LayerControlData With {
                        .ImageResource = imageRes,
                        .Height = pich * 2,
                        .LocationY = maxlocy
                    })
                End If

                maxlocy -= pich
                Dim nu As Boolean = True

                '◘ Continue layers
                For ii As Integer = 1 To layersqty - 2
                    Dim imageRes As Image
                    If layescompletes >= ii Then
                        If layescompletes >= ii + 1 Then
                            imageRes = My.Resources.lay_m_hole_vv
                        Else
                            imageRes = My.Resources.lay_m_hole_vb
                            nu = False
                        End If
                    Else
                        If layescompletes >= If(nu, ii, ii + 1) Then
                            imageRes = If(ly1f = True, My.Resources.lay_m_hole_vb, My.Resources.lay_m_hole_bb)
                            nu = True
                        Else
                            imageRes = My.Resources.lay_m_hole_bb
                        End If
                    End If

                    controlsToCreate.Add(New LayerControlData With {
                        .ImageResource = imageRes,
                        .Height = pich,
                        .LocationY = maxlocy
                    })
                    maxlocy -= pich
                Next

                '◘ Almost last
                If layersqty > 1 Then
                    Dim imageRes As Image
                    If layescompletes >= layersqty - 1 Then
                        imageRes = If(layescompletes >= layersqty, My.Resources.lay_m_nhole_vv, My.Resources.lay_m_nhole_vb)
                    Else
                        imageRes = My.Resources.lay_m_nhole_bb
                    End If

                    controlsToCreate.Add(New LayerControlData With {
                        .ImageResource = imageRes,
                        .Height = pich,
                        .LocationY = maxlocy
                    })
                Else
                    maxlocy += pich
                End If

                '◘ Last layer
                maxlocy -= pich
                maxlocy -= pich
                Dim lastImageRes As Image = If(layescompletes >= layersqty, My.Resources.lay_top_hole_v, My.Resources.lay_top_hole_b)
                controlsToCreate.Add(New LayerControlData With {
                    .ImageResource = lastImageRes,
                    .Height = pich * 2,
                    .LocationY = maxlocy
                })

                Return controlsToCreate
            End Function)

            '◘ Now update UI on UI thread with prepared data
            pnlLayers.SuspendLayout()
            Try
                'Clear existing controls
                pnlLayers.Controls.Clear()

                '◘ Create and add all controls in one batch
                For Each layerData In controlsData
                    Dim picn As New PictureBox With {
                        .Image = layerData.ImageResource,
                        .SizeMode = PictureBoxSizeMode.StretchImage,
                        .Height = layerData.Height,
                        .Location = New Point(20, layerData.LocationY)
                    }
                    pnlLayers.Controls.Add(picn)
                Next

            Finally
                pnlLayers.ResumeLayout(True)
            End Try

        Catch ex As Exception
            Console.WriteLine("Error in Layers_Drawing_AsyncTask: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Function

                    Else
                        If layescompletes >= If(nu, ii, ii + 1) Then
                            imageRes = If(ly1f = True, My.Resources.lay_m_hole_vb, My.Resources.lay_m_hole_bb)
                            nu = True
                        Else
                            imageRes = My.Resources.lay_m_hole_bb
                        End If
                    End If

                    controlsToCreate.Add(New LayerControlData With {
                        .ImageResource = imageRes,
                        .Height = pich,
                        .LocationY = maxlocy
                    })
                    maxlocy -= pich
                Next

                '◘ Almost last
                If layersqty > 1 Then
                    Dim imageRes As Image
                    If layescompletes >= layersqty - 1 Then
                        imageRes = If(layescompletes >= layersqty, My.Resources.lay_m_nhole_vv, My.Resources.lay_m_nhole_vb)
                    Else
                        imageRes = My.Resources.lay_m_nhole_bb
                    End If

                    controlsToCreate.Add(New LayerControlData With {
                        .ImageResource = imageRes,
                        .Height = pich,
                        .LocationY = maxlocy
                    })
                Else
                    maxlocy += pich
                End If

                '◘ Last layer
                maxlocy -= pich
                maxlocy -= pich
                Dim lastImageRes As Image = If(layescompletes >= layersqty, My.Resources.lay_top_hole_v, My.Resources.lay_top_hole_b)
                controlsToCreate.Add(New LayerControlData With {
                    .ImageResource = lastImageRes,
                    .Height = pich * 2,
                    .LocationY = maxlocy
                })

                Return controlsToCreate
            End Function)

            '◘ Now update UI on UI thread with prepared data
            pnlLayers.SuspendLayout()
            Try
                'Clear existing controls
                pnlLayers.Controls.Clear()

                '◘ Create and add all controls in one batch
                For Each layerData In controlsData
                    Dim picn As New PictureBox With {
                        .Image = layerData.ImageResource,
                        .SizeMode = PictureBoxSizeMode.StretchImage,
                        .Height = layerData.Height,
                        .Location = New Point(20, layerData.LocationY)
                    }
                    pnlLayers.Controls.Add(picn)
                Next

            Finally
                pnlLayers.ResumeLayout(True)
            End Try

        Catch ex As Exception
            Console.WriteLine("Error in Layers_Drawing_AsyncTask: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Function

    Public Sub updatebox()

        '◘ Calcule unis by layer
        ExData.UnitsByLayer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_GoalQty
        ExData.CurrentLayerSerial = ""

        Dim qtylocallayers As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersQty - ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersEmptyBottom - ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersEmptyTop
        Dim curretnquantity As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty
        Dim currentaql As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_GoalQty
        If qtylocallayers > 0 Then
            '◘ Units By Panel
            Dim unitsbylayers As Integer = Math.Floor(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_GoalQty / qtylocallayers)

            If unitsbylayers = 0 Then
                ExData.UnitsByLayer = unitsbylayers + 1
                Dim currentl As Integer = Math.Floor(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty / ExData.UnitsByLayer)

                '◘ CurrentLayer
                ExData.CurrentLayer = currentl
                ExData.CurrentLayerQty = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty Mod ExData.UnitsByLayer
            Else
                ExData.UnitsByLayer = unitsbylayers
                Dim currentl As Integer = Math.Floor(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty / ExData.UnitsByLayer)

                '◘ CurrentLayer
                ExData.CurrentLayer = currentl
                ExData.CurrentLayerQty = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty Mod unitsbylayers
            End If
        Else
            ExData.CurrentLayer = 0
            ExData.CurrentLayerQty = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty
        End If

        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty > 0 Then
            '◘ Get box layers 
            Dim dt As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("Select LayerPos as Position,LayerCode,IsEmpty  FROM PD_tbl_units_packed_layers WHERE BoxID = '" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID & "' order by Position asc")

            ExData.LayersName = dt
            ExData.CurrentLayer = ExData.CurrentLayer
            ExData.CurrentLayerQty = ExData.CurrentLayerQty
            If dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                ExData.CurrentLayerSerial = dt.Rows(dt.Rows.Count - 1).Item("LayerCode")
            End If
        Else
            '◘ Update box layers (delete) to star empty
            BeConn.UpdateRecords("DELETE FROM PD_tbl_units_packed_layers WHERE BoxID = '" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID & "'")

            Dim layername As New DataTable
            layername.Columns.Add("Position", GetType(System.Int32))
            layername.Columns.Add("LayerCode", GetType(System.String))
            'layername.Columns.Add("Complete", GetType(System.Boolean))
            layername.Columns.Add("IsEmpty", GetType(System.Boolean))

            ExData.LayersName = layername
            ExData.CurrentLayer = 0
            ExData.CurrentLayerQty = 0
            ExData.CurrentLayerSerial = ""
        End If
    End Sub

    Public Sub Layers_Drawing()

        '◘ Draw layers qty
        Dim layersqty As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersQty - ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersEmptyBottom - ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersEmptyTop

        'Suspend layout to improve performance during bulk updates
        pnlLayers.SuspendLayout()

        Try
            'Clear controls in panel (Panel size: 144, 143)
            pnlLayers.Controls.Clear()

            Dim qtybuild As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty
            Dim lyuin As Integer = ExData.UnitsByLayer

            Dim layescompletes As Integer = 1

            Try
                layescompletes = Math.Floor(qtybuild / ExData.UnitsByLayer)
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Dim height As Integer = 140
            '
            Dim picqty As Integer = layersqty + 2
            Dim pich As Integer = Math.Floor(height / picqty)

            Dim maxlocy As Integer = height - pich - pich

            Dim ly1f As Boolean = False
            'First layer...

            If layersqty > 1 Then
                ly1f = True
                Dim picn As New PictureBox
                If layescompletes >= 1 Then
                    picn.Image = My.Resources.lay_dwn_hole_v
                Else
                    picn.Image = My.Resources.lay_dwn_hole_b
                End If

                picn.SizeMode = PictureBoxSizeMode.StretchImage
                picn.Height = pich * 2
                picn.Location = New Point(20, maxlocy)
                pnlLayers.Controls.Add(picn)
            Else
                Dim picn As New PictureBox
                If layescompletes >= 1 Then
                    picn.Image = My.Resources.lay_dwn_nhole_v
                    ly1f = True
                Else
                    ly1f = False
                    picn.Image = My.Resources.lay_dwn_nhole_b
                End If
                picn.SizeMode = PictureBoxSizeMode.StretchImage
                picn.Height = pich * 2
                picn.Location = New Point(20, maxlocy)
                pnlLayers.Controls.Add(picn)
            End If

            maxlocy -= pich

            Dim nu As Boolean = True
            'Continue layers
            For ii As Integer = 1 To layersqty - 2
                Dim picn As New PictureBox
                If layescompletes >= ii Then
                    If layescompletes >= ii + 1 Then
                        picn.Image = My.Resources.lay_m_hole_vv
                    Else
                        picn.Image = My.Resources.lay_m_hole_vb
                        nu = False
                    End If
                Else
                    If layescompletes >= If(nu, ii, ii + 1) Then
                        If ly1f = True Then
                            picn.Image = My.Resources.lay_m_hole_vb
                        Else
                            picn.Image = My.Resources.lay_m_hole_bb
                        End If
                        nu = True
                    Else
                        picn.Image = My.Resources.lay_m_hole_bb
                    End If
                End If

                picn.SizeMode = PictureBoxSizeMode.StretchImage
                picn.Height = pich
                picn.Location = New Point(20, maxlocy)
                pnlLayers.Controls.Add(picn)
                maxlocy -= pich
            Next

            'almost last
            If layersqty > 1 Then
                Dim picn As New PictureBox
                If layescompletes >= layersqty - 1 Then
                    If layescompletes >= layersqty Then
                        picn.Image = My.Resources.lay_m_nhole_vv
                    Else
                        picn.Image = My.Resources.lay_m_nhole_vb
                    End If
                Else
                    picn.Image = My.Resources.lay_m_nhole_bb
                End If

                picn.SizeMode = PictureBoxSizeMode.StretchImage
                picn.Height = pich
                picn.Location = New Point(20, maxlocy)
                pnlLayers.Controls.Add(picn)
            Else
                maxlocy += pich
            End If


            'Lastlayer
            maxlocy -= pich
            maxlocy -= pich
            If 1 = 1 Then
                Dim picn As New PictureBox
                If layescompletes >= layersqty Then
                    picn.Image = My.Resources.lay_top_hole_v
                Else
                    picn.Image = My.Resources.lay_top_hole_b
                End If
                picn.SizeMode = PictureBoxSizeMode.StretchImage
                picn.Height = pich * 2
                picn.Location = New Point(20, maxlocy)
                pnlLayers.Controls.Add(picn)
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            ' Log or handle error as needed
            Console.WriteLine("Error in Layers_Drawing: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            'Always resume layout even if error occurs
            pnlLayers.ResumeLayout(True) 'True = perform pending layout immediately
        End Try
    End Sub

    '◘ ASYNC VERSION - Uses BackgroundWorker for better performance with large layer counts (50+ layers)
    Public Sub Layers_Drawing_Async()
        'Prevent multiple concurrent drawing operations
        If isLayerDrawingInProgress Then
            Return
        End If

        'Start background work
        If Not layerDrawingWorker.IsBusy Then
            isLayerDrawingInProgress = True
            'Optional: Show loading indicator
            'pnlLayers.Visible = False
            layerDrawingWorker.RunWorkerAsync()
        End If
    End Sub

    'BackgroundWorker DoWork - Runs on background thread
    Private Sub LayerDrawingWorker_DoWork(sender As Object, e As System.ComponentModel.DoWorkEventArgs) Handles layerDrawingWorker.DoWork
        Try
            '◘ Calculate all layer data in background thread (NO UI OPERATIONS HERE)
            Dim layersqty As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersQty - ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersEmptyBottom - ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersEmptyTop
            Dim qtybuild As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty
            Dim lyuin As Integer = ExData.UnitsByLayer

            Dim layescompletes As Integer = 1
            Try
                layescompletes = Math.Floor(qtybuild / ExData.UnitsByLayer)
            Catch
            End Try

            Dim height As Integer = 140
            Dim picqty As Integer = layersqty + 2
            Dim pich As Integer = Math.Floor(height / picqty)
            Dim maxlocy As Integer = height - pich - pich

            '◘ Prepare list of controls to create
            Dim controlsToCreate As New List(Of LayerControlData)

            Dim ly1f As Boolean = False

            '◘ First layer
            If layersqty > 1 Then
                ly1f = True
                Dim imageRes As Image
                If layescompletes >= 1 Then
                    imageRes = My.Resources.lay_dwn_hole_v
                Else
                    imageRes = My.Resources.lay_dwn_hole_b
                End If
                controlsToCreate.Add(New LayerControlData With {
                    .ImageResource = imageRes,
                    .Height = pich * 2,
                    .LocationY = maxlocy
                })
            Else
                Dim imageRes As Image
                If layescompletes >= 1 Then
                    imageRes = My.Resources.lay_dwn_nhole_v
                    ly1f = True
                Else
                    ly1f = False
                    imageRes = My.Resources.lay_dwn_nhole_b
                End If
                controlsToCreate.Add(New LayerControlData With {
                    .ImageResource = imageRes,
                    .Height = pich * 2,
                    .LocationY = maxlocy
                })
            End If

            maxlocy -= pich

            Dim nu As Boolean = True

            '◘ Continue layers
            For ii As Integer = 1 To layersqty - 2
                Dim imageRes As Image
                If layescompletes >= ii Then
                    If layescompletes >= ii + 1 Then
                        imageRes = My.Resources.lay_m_hole_vv
                    Else
                        imageRes = My.Resources.lay_m_hole_vb
                        nu = False
                    End If
                Else
                    If layescompletes >= If(nu, ii, ii + 1) Then
                        If ly1f = True Then
                            imageRes = My.Resources.lay_m_hole_vb
                        Else
                            imageRes = My.Resources.lay_m_hole_bb
                        End If
                        nu = True
                    Else
                        imageRes = My.Resources.lay_m_hole_bb
                    End If
                End If

                controlsToCreate.Add(New LayerControlData With {
                    .ImageResource = imageRes,
                    .Height = pich,
                    .LocationY = maxlocy
                })
                maxlocy -= pich
            Next

            '◘ Almost last
            If layersqty > 1 Then
                Dim imageRes As Image
                If layescompletes >= layersqty - 1 Then
                    If layescompletes >= layersqty Then
                        imageRes = My.Resources.lay_m_nhole_vv
                    Else
                        imageRes = My.Resources.lay_m_nhole_vb
                    End If
                Else
                    imageRes = My.Resources.lay_m_nhole_bb
                End If

                controlsToCreate.Add(New LayerControlData With {
                    .ImageResource = imageRes,
                    .Height = pich,
                    .LocationY = maxlocy
                })
            Else
                maxlocy += pich
            End If

            '◘ Last layer
            maxlocy -= pich
            maxlocy -= pich
            Dim lastImageRes As Image
            If layescompletes >= layersqty Then
                lastImageRes = My.Resources.lay_top_hole_v
            Else
                lastImageRes = My.Resources.lay_top_hole_b
            End If
            controlsToCreate.Add(New LayerControlData With {
                .ImageResource = lastImageRes,
                .Height = pich * 2,
                .LocationY = maxlocy
            })

            '◘ Return prepared data to UI thread
            e.Result = controlsToCreate

        Catch ex As Exception
            Console.WriteLine("Error in LayerDrawingWorker_DoWork: " & ex.Message)
            e.Result = Nothing
        End Try
    End Sub

    'BackgroundWorker RunWorkerCompleted - Runs on UI thread
    Private Sub LayerDrawingWorker_RunWorkerCompleted(sender As Object, e As System.ComponentModel.RunWorkerCompletedEventArgs) Handles layerDrawingWorker.RunWorkerCompleted
        Try
            If e.Result IsNot Nothing Then
                Dim controlsData As List(Of LayerControlData) = CType(e.Result, List(Of LayerControlData))

                '◘ Now update UI on UI thread with prepared data
                pnlLayers.SuspendLayout()

                Try
                    'Clear existing controls
                    pnlLayers.Controls.Clear()

                    '◘ Create and add all controls in one batch
                    For Each layerData In controlsData
                        Dim picn As New PictureBox With {
                            .Image = layerData.ImageResource,
                            .SizeMode = PictureBoxSizeMode.StretchImage,
                            .Height = layerData.Height,
                            .Location = New Point(20, layerData.LocationY)
                        }
                        pnlLayers.Controls.Add(picn)
                    Next

                Finally
                    pnlLayers.ResumeLayout(True)
                    'Optional: Show panel again if hidden
                    'pnlLayers.Visible = True
                End Try
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            Console.WriteLine("Error in LayerDrawingWorker_RunWorkerCompleted: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            isLayerDrawingInProgress = False
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public Sub Layers_Calculate()

        lblnewlayer.Visible = False

        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty >= If(CurrentLayer - ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersEmptyBottom < 0, 0, CurrentLayer - ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersEmptyBottom) * ExData.UnitsByLayer Then

                    '    Dim options = New frm_PVS_msgLayerComplete()

                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CheckLayers And layer_requested = False Then
                        ShowFormBig(New frm_PVS_layerAdd)

                    End If
                Next
            ElseIf ExData.CurrentLayerQty = 0 Then

                ExData.CurrentLayer += 1
                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PVS_Alerts_Layers.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                    For Each alert As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PVS_Alerts_Layers.Rows
                        If alert.Item(1).ToString().Length > 4 Then
                            Dim options = New frm_PVS_layerAlert(alert.Item(0), alert.Item(1))
                            options.ShowDialog()
                        End If
                    Next
                End If

                lblnewlayer.Visible = True

                'If ExData.CONF_Packout_Display_Layers_Message Or ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PVS_Alerts_Layers_Yes Then
                '    Dim options = New frm_PVS_msgLayerComplete()
                '    options.ShowDialog()
                'End If

                ExData.LayerIsEmpty = False
                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CheckLayers And layer_requested = False Then
                    ExData.CurrentLayer -= 1

                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersEmptyBottom > 0 Then
                        For i As Integer = 1 To ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersEmptyBottom
                            'Request LayerID
                            ExData.CurrentLayer += 1
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CheckLayers And layer_requested = False Then
                                ShowFormBig(New frm_PVS_layerAdd)
                            End If
                        Next
                        layer_requested = True
                    Else
                        ShowFormBig(New frm_PVS_layerAdd)
                        layer_requested = True
                    End If

                    For i As Integer = 1 To ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersEmptyBottom
                        'Request LayerID
                        ExData.CurrentLayer += 1
                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PVS_Alerts_Layers.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                            For Each alert As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PVS_Alerts_Layers.Rows

                        ExData.LayerIsEmpty = True
                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CheckLayers And layer_requested = False Then
                            ShowFormBig(New frm_PVS_layerAdd)
                            layer_requested = True
                        End If
                    Next
                End If
            End If
        Else
            '◘ Keep layer
            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty = 0 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersEmptyBottom > 0 Then
                For i As Integer = 1 To ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersEmptyBottom

                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CheckLayers And layer_requested = False Then
                        ShowFormBig(New frm_PVS_layerAdd)
                        layer_requested = True
                    End If
                Next

                'Request layer valid
                ExData.CurrentLayer += 1

                'If ExData.PVS_Alerts_Layers.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                '    For Each alert As DataRow In ExData.PVS_Alerts_Layers.Rows
                '        Dim options = New frm_PVS_layer_alert(alert.Item(0), alert.Item(1))
                '        options.ShowDialog()
                '    Next
                'End If

                ExData.LayerIsEmpty = False
                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CheckLayers And layer_requested = False Then
                    ShowFormBig(New frm_PVS_layerAdd)
                    layer_requested = True
                End If

            ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty = 0 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersEmptyBottom = 0 Then
                ExData.CurrentLayer += 1

                'If ExData.PVS_Alerts_Layers.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                '    For Each alert As DataRow In ExData.PVS_Alerts_Layers.Rows
                '        Dim options = New frm_PVS_layer_alert(alert.Item(0), alert.Item(1))
                '        options.ShowDialog()
                '    Next
                'End If

                ExData.LayerIsEmpty = False
                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CheckLayers And layer_requested = False Then
                    ShowFormBig(New frm_PVS_layerAdd)
                    layer_requested = True
                End If
            End If
        End If

        lblchar.Visible = True
        lblcharola.Visible = True
        lblcharola.Text = ExData.CurrentLayerSerial

        lblLayerNo.Text = ExData.CurrentLayer + 1

        lbl_layer_title.Text = "Layer " & ExData.CurrentLayer + 1

        '2021-02-17 EM: Layer data...
        lblLayerTotal.Text = ExData.UnitsByLayer
        lblLayerCount.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty Mod ExData.UnitsByLayer
        'lbl_layerno.Text = "Layer " & ExData.CurrentLayer

        Try

            lblRowTotal.Text = Math.Floor(ExData.UnitsByLayer \ ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersRowsTotal)
            lblRowQty.Text = (ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty Mod ExData.UnitsByLayer) Mod ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersRowsQty

            lblRowNo.Text = 1

            lblRowNo.Text = Math.Ceiling((ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty Mod ExData.UnitsByLayer) / ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersRowsQty)

            drawlayer(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty Mod ExData.UnitsByLayer)
        Catch ex As Exception

    'LIST OF SQUARE OBJECTS
    Private Squares As List(Of SquareItem) = Nothing

    Private Class SquareItem
        Property Bounds As Rectangle
        Property Clicked As Boolean
        Property ClickedColor As Color
    End Class

    Private Sub drawlayer(no As Integer)

        pnlLayer.Controls.Clear()

        Try
            Squares = New List(Of SquareItem)

            Dim SquareSpacing As Integer = 2

            Dim SquaresPerRow As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersRowsQty

            Dim TotalRows = Math.Ceiling(ExData.UnitsByLayer \ SquaresPerRow)

            Dim SquareEdgeLength As Integer = Math.Ceiling((pnlLayer.Width - (SquareSpacing * SquaresPerRow)) \ ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LayersRowsQty)

            Dim SquareEdgeLengthH As Integer = Math.Ceiling((pnlLayer.Height - (SquareSpacing * TotalRows)) \ TotalRows)

            If SquareEdgeLength > 0 And SquareEdgeLengthH > 0 Then

                Dim SquareSize As New Size(SquareEdgeLength, SquareEdgeLength)

                Dim RowPoint As Integer = 1

                Dim ColPoint As Integer = 1

                Dim itemno As Integer = 1

                For i As Integer = 1 To TotalRows

                    ColPoint = 1

                    For j As Integer = 1 To SquaresPerRow
                        Dim smlpanel As Panel = New Panel()

                        smlpanel.Width = SquareEdgeLength

                        smlpanel.Height = SquareEdgeLengthH

                        ColPoint = ColPoint + (SquareEdgeLength + SquareSpacing)

                        smlpanel.Location = New Point(ColPoint, RowPoint)

                        If itemno <= no Then
                            smlpanel.BackColor = Color.GreenYellow
                        Else
                            smlpanel.BackColor = Color.Gray
                        End If

                        smlpanel.Margin = New Padding(0, 0, 0, 0)

                        pnlLayer.Controls.Add(smlpanel)

                        itemno += 1
                    Next

                    RowPoint += (SquareEdgeLengthH + SquareSpacing)
                Next
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try
    End Sub

    Public Sub Gage_Activate()
        '◘ Determines if gage is available
        pnlGage.Enabled = False
        'btnDesactGage.Enabled = False

        'Read Gage Values
        'TODO Tabeles
        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.gagename = ""

        Dim integration_Selected As Boolean = False


        'TCPIP 
        If integration_Selected = False Then
            ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_On = False
            Dim dt_pack_tcpip_in As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [PartID],[IP],[Port],[Timer],[CLIENT_OR_SERVER],[SLAVE] FROM [Part_Operation_Packout_TCPIP] WHERE PartID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "' order by slave asc")
            If dt_pack_tcpip_in.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                'DB9_LastDetection_Time = DateTime.Now

                ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_Data = dt_pack_tcpip_in
                Dim visionRows = From row In dt_pack_tcpip_in.AsEnumerable()
                                 Where row.Field(Of Integer)("SLAVE") = 0
                                 Order By row.Field(Of Integer)("SLAVE")
                                 Select row


                Dim firstRow = visionRows.FirstOrDefault()

                If firstRow IsNot Nothing Then
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_On = True
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_Master = True
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_ClientOrServer = firstRow.Field(Of String)("CLIENT_OR_SERVER")
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_IP = firstRow.Field(Of String)("IP")
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_Port = firstRow.Field(Of String)("Port")

                End If


                Dim visionRowsSlave = From row In dt_pack_tcpip_in.AsEnumerable()
                                      Where row.Field(Of Integer)("SLAVE") <> 0
                                      Order By row.Field(Of Integer)("SLAVE")
                                      Select row

                If visionRowsSlave.Count > 0 Then
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_Slave = True

                End If

                ' ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_ClientOrServer = dt_pack_tcpip_in.Rows(0).Item("CLIENT_OR_SERVER")
                '  ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_IP = dt_pack_tcpip_in.Rows(0).Item("IP")
                'ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_Port = dt_pack_tcpip_in.Rows(0).Item("Port")

                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_ClientOrServer = "CLIENT" Then

                    tcp_Client_Conenction = New TcpClient(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_IP, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_Port)

                    tcp_Client_Conenction.ReceiveTimeout = 500
                    tcp_Client_Conenction.SendTimeout = 500

                    lbltcpip.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_IP

    '2020-01-22 EM: SERIAL PORT SENSOR IN
    Dim DB9_1 As New SerialPort

    'Pines
    Dim DB9_Pin6 As BePin '2020-01-22 EM: SENSOR 1 PIN 6 CAFE
    Dim DB9_Pin8 As BePin '2020-01-22 EM: SENSOR 2 PIN 8 GRIS
    Dim DB9_Pin1 As BePin '2020-01-22 EM: AOI IN GOOD/BAD PIN 1 MORADO
    Dim DB9_Pin9 As BePin

    Sub Load_DB9_Ports_Setup()
        'READ CONFIGURATION IF EXIST
        Dim productName As String = "NoName"

        Try
            productName = System.Reflection.Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().GetName().Name
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        '◘ Create directory
        Dim confDir As String = "C:\BeFirst\Configuration"

        If My.Computer.FileSystem.DirectoryExists(confDir) Then

        Else
            Directory.CreateDirectory(confDir)
            Try
                Dim ToHideDir As New System.IO.DirectoryInfo(confDir)
                ToHideDir.Attributes = IO.FileAttributes.Hidden
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try
        End If

        'Hide folder
        Dim fileName As String = confDir & "\" & productName & "_COM_SENSOR_IN.txt"
        ExData.port_sensor_in_file_in = fileName

        '◘ Read File (Configuration)
        If My.Computer.FileSystem.FileExists(fileName) Then
            'Read current settings
            Dim readText() As String = File.ReadAllLines(fileName)
            Dim s As String
            For Each s In readText
                'Read if sline is valid
                If s.Length > 1 Then
                    'Check if a variable
                    If s.Substring(0, 1) = "@" Then
                        Dim variables() = s.Substring(1).Split("^")
                        Select Case variables(0)
                            Case "port_sensor_in_com_port1_in"
                                ExData.port_sensor_in_com_port1_in = variables(1)
                            Case "port_sensor_in_com_baud1_in"
                                ExData.port_sensor_in_com_baud1_in = variables(1)
                            Case "port_sensor_in_com_parity1_in"
                                ExData.port_sensor_in_com_parity1_in = variables(1)
                            Case "port_sensor_in_com_data1_in"
                                ExData.port_sensor_in_com_data1_in = variables(1)
                            Case "port_sensor_in_com_stop1_in"
                                ExData.port_sensor_in_com_stop1_in = variables(1)
                        End Select
                    End If
                End If
            Next

            'Build and show ports...

            'LOAD PORTS....
            Try
                If ExData.port_sensor_in_com_port1_in.Contains("COM") Then
                    Try
                        DB9_1.Close()
                    Catch ex As Exception

                    End Try
                    If DB9_1.IsOpen Then
                        DB9_1.Close()
                    End If

                    DB9_1.PortName = ExData.port_sensor_in_com_port1_in
                    DB9_1.BaudRate = CInt(ExData.port_sensor_in_com_baud1_in)
                    DB9_1.StopBits = ExData.port_sensor_in_com_stop1_in
                    DB9_1.Parity = Parity.Even
                    DB9_1.ReadTimeout = 500
                    'DB9_1.Handshake = Handshake.None
                    'DB9_1.Encoding = System.Text.Encoding.Default 'very important!
                    'If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_SmallKeyence_On Then
                    '    AddHandler DB9_1.DataReceived, AddressOf DataReceivedHandler
                    'End If
                    'AddHandler DB9_1.DataReceived, AddressOf DataReceivedHandler

                    DB9_1.Open()

                    'DB9_1.WriteLine("@SET TRG LVL")

                    Try
                        Dim lon As String = vbCr + "LON" + vbCr     ' <CR>LON<CR>
                        Dim command As Byte() = ASCIIEncoding.ASCII.GetBytes(lon)
                        command(0) = bySTX      ' <STX>LON<CR>
                        command(4) = byETX      ' <STX>LON<ETX>

                        DB9_1.Write(command, 0, command.Length)
                    Catch ex As Exception

                    End Try
                Else

                End If
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub DataReceivedHandler(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs)
        Dim sp As SerialPort = CType(sender, SerialPort)
        Dim Incoming As String = sp.ReadLine()
        If Incoming Is Nothing Then
            'sensor1 = False
        Else
            Dim Incoming_Text As String = Incoming.Trim()
            txtFromKeyence.Text = Incoming_Text

            If txtFromKeyence.Text.Length > 5 And DB9_SmallTester_Old_SN <> txtFromKeyence.Text Then
                DB9_SmallTester_Old_SN = txtFromKeyence.Text
                processsn(txtFromKeyence.Text, False)
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Dim DB9_LastDetection_Time As DateTime

    Dim DB9_SmallTester_Old_SN As String = ""

    Sub Read_DB9_Values_SensorIn()
        Try
            'If DB9_Pin1 Is Nothing Then
            '    DB9_Pin1 = New BePin(_Pins.DCD)
            'End If

            'DB9_Pin1.State = _Pins.DCD

            If DB9_1.CDHolding And DateDiff(DateInterval.Second, DB9_LastDetection_Time, DateTime.Now) >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_SensorIn_Each_Minimum Then
                picSensorOn.Image = My.Resources.tablilla
                ExData.Sensor_IN_PVS_status = 1
            Else
                picSensorOn.Image = My.Resources.tablillavacia
                If ExData.Sensor_IN_PVS_status = 1 Then

                    ExData.Sensor_IN_PVS_status = 2

                    If ExData.Sensor_IN_PVS_status = 2 Then
                        tmrSensorOnly.Stop()

                        Dim new_ssn As String = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartNumber.Substring(3, 5) & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMddHHmmssffff")

                        processsn(new_ssn, False)

                        DB9_LastDetection_Time = DateTime.Now

                        ExData.Sensor_IN_PVS_status = 0

                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty < ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_GoalQty Then
                            tmrSensorOnly.Start()
                        End If
                    End If
                Else
                    ExData.Sensor_IN_PVS_status = 0
                End If
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try
    End Sub

    Dim TCP_Vision As TcpClient
    Dim TH_VISION As New Threading.Thread(AddressOf TH_VISION_CONNECTED)
    Dim TH_SALIR As Boolean = False

    Dim Keyence_Vision_System_Result As String = ""
    Dim Keyence_Vision_System_Command As String = ""

    Public Function TH_VISION_CONNECTED() As Boolean
        Do
            If TH_SALIR = True Then
                Exit Do
            End If
            If tcp_Client_Conenction.Connected = True Then
                If Keyence_Vision_System_Command <> "" Then
                    Dim Databyte() As Byte
                    Databyte = New ASCIIEncoding().GetBytes(Keyence_Vision_System_Command)
                    tcp_Client_Conenction.Client.Send(Databyte)
                    Keyence_Vision_System_Command = ""
                    'txtCommand.Text = ""
                End If
            Else

            End If
            'Si tenemos datos a la espera
            If tcp_Client_Conenction.Connected = True Then
                If tcp_Client_Conenction.Available > 0 Then
                    Dim TextoDewvuelto As String
                    Dim BytesDevuelto(100) As Byte
                    tcp_Client_Conenction.Client.Receive(BytesDevuelto)
                    TextoDewvuelto = New ASCIIEncoding().GetString(BytesDevuelto)
                    Keyence_Vision_System_Result = TextoDewvuelto
                Else

                End If
            Else

            End If
        Loop
        Return True
    End Function

        If My.Computer.FileSystem.FileExists(fileName) Then
            'Read current settings
            Dim readText() As String = File.ReadAllLines(fileName)
            Dim s As String
            For Each s In readText
                'Read if sline is valid
                If s.Length > 1 Then
                    'Check if a variable
                    If s.Substring(0, 1) = "@" Then
                        Dim variables() = s.Substring(1).Split("^")
                        Select Case variables(0)
                            Case "port_com_port1_in"
                                ExData.port_com_port1_in = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_baud1_in"
                                ExData.port_com_baud1_in = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_parity1_in"
                                ExData.port_com_parity1_in = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_data1_in"
                                ExData.port_com_data1_in = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_stop1_in"
                                ExData.port_com_stop1_in = variables(1)
                        End Select
                    End If
                End If
            Next

            'Build and show ports...
            ' txtcom1.Text = ExData.port_com_port1_in

            'LOAD PORTS....
            Try
                If ExData.port_com_port1_in.Contains("COM") Then
                    If sp1.IsOpen Then
                        sp1.Close()
                    End If
                    sp1.PortName = ExData.port_com_port1_in
                    sp1.BaudRate = CInt(ExData.port_com_baud1_in)
                    'sp1.StopBits = ExData.port_com_stop1
                    'sp1.Parity = ExData.port_com_parity1
                    'sp1.Handshake = Handshake.None
                    'sp1.Encoding = System.Text.Encoding.Default 'very important!
                    AddHandler sp1.DataReceived, AddressOf DataReceivedArduinoHandler

                    sp1.Open()
                    'sp1.DtrEnable = True
                    ' txtTCPIP.Text = "Connected"
                    ' txtTCPIP.BackColor = Color.Honeydew
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_Arduino = True
                    lblArduino.Text = "Arduino Connected"


                    'tmr_read.Start()
                Else
                    lblArduino.Text = "Arduino Not Connected"

                    ' txtTCPIP.Text = "No connected"
                    ' txtTCPIP.ForeColor = Color.Red
                    ' tmr_read.Stop()
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            'If txtcom1.Text.Contains("COM") Then
            '    tmr_tryconnect.Start()
            'End If

        Else

            ExData.port_com_port1_in = "No Configurate"
            ExData.port_com_baud1_in = "9600"
            ExData.port_com_parity1_in = "Even"
            ExData.port_com_data1_in = "8"
            ExData.port_com_stop1_in = "1"

            'TRY SAVE FILE
            'Create File
            File.Create(fileName).Dispose()

            'Actualizaciones
            Dim qty_values As Integer = 14
            Dim aryText(qty_values) As String

            aryText(0) = "@port_com_port1_in^" & ExData.port_com_port1_in
            aryText(1) = "@port_com_baud1_in^" & ExData.port_com_baud1_in
            aryText(2) = "@port_com_parity1_in^" & ExData.port_com_parity1_in
            aryText(3) = "@port_com_data1_in^" & ExData.port_com_data1_in
            aryText(4) = "@port_com_stop1_in^" & ExData.port_com_stop1_in


            Dim objWriter As New System.IO.StreamWriter(fileName, True)
            For i = 0 To qty_values
                objWriter.WriteLine(aryText(i))
            Next

            objWriter.Close()

            '  readvaluesArduino()

        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub DataReceivedArduinoHandler(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs)
        Dim sp As SerialPort = CType(sender, SerialPort)
        Dim Incoming As String = sp.ReadExisting()
        If Incoming Is Nothing Then
            'sensor1 = False
        Else
            Dim Incoming_Text As String = Incoming.Trim()

            If Incoming.Length > 0 Then

                lblArduinoCode.Text = Incoming.Trim()

    Sub Read_DB9_Values_SmallTest()
        Try
            DB9_1.DtrEnable = False

            Dim screw1 As Boolean = False
            Dim screw2 As Boolean = False

            If DB9_1.CDHolding Then
                screw1 = True
                ExFunctions.SetLedColor(picSensor2, True)
            Else
                ExFunctions.SetLedColor(picSensor2, False)
            End If

            If DB9_1.CtsHolding Then
                screw2 = True
                ExFunctions.SetLedColor(picSensor3, True)
            Else
                ExFunctions.SetLedColor(picSensor3, False)
            End If

            If DB9_1.DsrHolding And DateDiff(DateInterval.Second, DB9_LastDetection_Time, DateTime.Now) >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_SmallTester_Each_Minimum Then

                ExFunctions.SetLedColor(picSensor1, True)

                Dim UnitStatus As Boolean = False

                If screw1 And screw2 Then
                    UnitStatus = True
                End If


                If UnitStatus Then
                    'Send trigger to get serial no
                    Dim SerialFromKeyence As String = ""

                    DB9_1.DtrEnable = True

                    'Wait for response
                    'Wait some seconds (2 seconds)
                    For i As Integer = 0 To Math.Floor(20)
                        System.Threading.Thread.Sleep(10)
                    Next

                    SerialFromKeyence = DB9_1.ReadExisting

                    SerialFromKeyence = SerialFromKeyence.Trim()

                    txtFromKeyence.Text = SerialFromKeyence

                    If SerialFromKeyence.Length > 5 And DB9_SmallTester_Old_SN <> SerialFromKeyence Then

                        DB9_SmallTester_Old_SN = SerialFromKeyence

                        '2024-03-25 EM: Vision Tester if applies (Hannon)
                        Dim visionTester As Boolean = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Scanner_Vision_Tester_On
                        Dim visionTester_Resutl As Boolean = False

                        If visionTester Then
                            Keyence_Vision_System_Command = "T2
"
                            Dim temp_Keyence_Vision_System_Result As String = Keyence_Vision_System_Result

                            While temp_Keyence_Vision_System_Result = ""
                                '2025-03-24 EM: Wait for scan of material...
                            End While

                            Keyence_Vision_System_Result = ""

                            If temp_Keyence_Vision_System_Result.Contains(",") Then
                                Dim mensaje As String() = temp_Keyence_Vision_System_Result.Split(",")
                                If mensaje.Length > 2 Then
                                    If mensaje(2) = "OK" Then
                                        visionTester_Resutl = True
                                    End If
                                End If
                            End If
                        Else
                            visionTester_Resutl = True
                        End If

                        If visionTester_Resutl Then
                            processsn(SerialFromKeyence, False)
                        Else
                            ShowMSG("VISION SYSTEM FAIL", "NO VISION SYSTEM")
                        End If
                    End If
                End If

                DB9_LastDetection_Time = DateTime.Now

                DB9_1.DtrEnable = False
            Else
                'Just ignore 
                ExFunctions.SetLedColor(picSensor1, False)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty < ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_GoalQty Then
            tmrSmallTester.Start()
        End If
    End Sub

    Dim KeyencePosition As Integer = 1
    Dim KeyenceResult As Boolean = True

    Dim KeyenceRestart As Boolean = True

    Dim KeyenceOldSerials As New List(Of String)
    Dim KeyenceDatetimeLast As DateTime = DateTime.Now

    'delegateUserControl is for controlling UserControl from other threads.
    Private Delegate Sub delegateUserControl(str As String)

    Private Sub ReceivedDataAction(data As Byte())
        'Define received data actions here.Defined actions work asynchronously.
        '"ReceivedDataWrite" works when reading data was received.
        'BeginInvoke(New delegateUserControl(AddressOf ReceivedDataWrite), System.Text.Encoding.ASCII.GetString(data))
    End Sub

    Private Sub readDataSub(ByRef recvSize As Integer, ByVal recvBytes() As Byte, ByVal serialPortInstance As SerialPort)
        Dim isCommandRes As Boolean
        Dim d As Byte

        '
        ' Distinguish between command response and read data.
        '
        Try
            d = serialPortInstance.ReadByte()
            recvBytes(recvSize) = d
            recvSize += 1
            If d = bySTX Then
                isCommandRes = True ' this is command response because the header character is STX
            End If
        Catch ex As TimeoutException
            '
            ' No data received.
            '
            Return
        End Try

        '
        ' Receive data until the terminator character.
        '
        While (True)
            Try
                d = serialPortInstance.ReadByte()
                recvBytes(recvSize) = d
                recvSize += 1
                If isCommandRes And (d = byETX) Then
                    '
                    ' Command response is received completely.
                    '
                    Exit Sub
                ElseIf d = byCR Then
                    Dim complete As Boolean
                    checkDataSize(complete, recvBytes, recvSize)
                    If complete Then
                        Exit Sub ' Read data is received completely.
                    End If
                End If
            Catch ex As TimeoutException
                '
                ' No terminator is received.
                '
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message)
                Return
            End Try
        End While
    End Sub

    Private Sub checkDataSize(ByRef complete As Boolean, ByVal recvBytes() As Byte, ByVal recvsize As Integer)
        Dim dataSizeLen As Integer = 4
        Dim asc0 As Integer = &H30

        If (binaryDataMode = False) Then
            complete = True
            Exit Sub
        End If

        If (recvsize < dataSizeLen) Then
            complete = False
            Exit Sub
        End If

        Dim dataSize As Integer = 0
        Dim mul As Integer = 1

        For i = 0 To dataSizeLen - 1
            dataSize += (recvBytes(dataSizeLen - 1 - i) - asc0) * mul
            mul *= 10
        Next
        If (dataSize + 1 = recvsize) Then
            complete = True
        Else
            complete = False
        End If
    End Sub

    Dim scannerold As String = ""

    Private Sub ReceivedDataWrite(receivedData As String)

        'tmrKeyence.Stop()

        If receivedData.Length > 10 Then
            If receivedData <> scannerold Then

                Dim continueAnalysis As Boolean = True

                Try
                    Dim unqiue = receivedData.Trim.Split(",")(0).Split(":")(0).Trim()
                    If KeyenceOldSerials.Contains(unqiue) Then
                        'IGnorar, es el mismo.
                        continueAnalysis = False
                    Else
                        continueAnalysis = True
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception

                End Try

                If continueAnalysis Then
                    Dim splitids() = receivedData.Trim.Split(",")
                    If splitids.Length = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Scanner_Quantity Then

                        'Check if have duplicate serials...
                        Dim duplicateserials As Boolean = False

                        'LOAD ITEMS
                        Dim ii As Integer = 0
                        For Each item In splitids
                            If item = "ERROR" Then
                                ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Scanner_Items.Rows(ii).Item(0) = CInt(ii + 1)
                                ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Scanner_Items.Rows(ii).Item(1) = "NOSERIAL"
                            Else
                                Dim elements() = item.Split(":")

                                If elements.Length = 2 Then
                                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Scanner_Items.Rows(ii).Item(0) = CInt(elements(1).Trim())
                                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Scanner_Items.Rows(ii).Item(1) = elements(0).Trim()

                                    Dim selection() = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Scanner_Items.Select("SSN='" & elements(0).Trim() & "'")

                                    If selection.Length > 1 Then
                                        duplicateserials = True
                                    End If
                                End If
                            End If

                            ii += 1
                        Next

                        If Math.Abs((KeyenceDatetimeLast - DateTime.Now).TotalSeconds) > 5 And duplicateserials = False Then

                            KeyenceDatetimeLast = DateTime.Now

                            KeyencePosition = 1

                            txtKeyence.Text = receivedData

                            'CLEAR list items 
                            Dim listControls As List(Of Control) = New List(Of Control)()

                            For Each control As Control In flpPositions.Controls
                                listControls.Add(control)
                            Next

                            For Each control As Control In listControls
                                flpPositions.Controls.Remove(control)
                                control.Dispose()
                            Next

                            'LOAD ITEMS...
                            Dim flp_width As Integer = flpPositions.Width
                            Dim ind_width As Integer = Math.Floor(flp_width / ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Scanner_Quantity)
                            Dim ind_height As Integer = flpPositions.Height


                            'VALIDATE SYSTEM
                            Dim oneItemFail As Boolean = False
                            For Each item As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Scanner_Items.Rows
                                KeyenceResult = True
                                KeyencePosition = item(0)

                                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty < ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_GoalQty Then

                                    ExData.Packout_Preview_Result = ""
                                    processsn(item(1), False, True)

                                    If ExData.Packout_Preview_Result.Length > 0 Or KeyenceResult = False Then
                                        oneItemFail = True
                                    End If

                                    Dim button As Button = New Button()
                                    button.Tag = "btn_it_" & KeyencePosition
                                    button.Text = KeyencePosition
                                    button.Width = ind_width - 6
                                    button.Height = ind_height - 6
                                    If KeyenceResult Then
                                        button.BackColor = Color.GreenYellow
                                    Else
                                        button.BackColor = Color.Red
                                    End If

                                    flpPositions.Controls.Add(button)

                                End If
                            Next

                            'CLEAR list items 2
                            If oneItemFail Then
                                MsgBox("Remplazar malas e intentar de nuevo!")
                            Else

                                Me.PlayerOK.Play()

                                'SEND ITEMS...
                                For Each item As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Scanner_Items.Rows
                                    KeyenceResult = True
                                    KeyencePosition = item(0)

                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty < ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_GoalQty Then
                                        processsn(item(1), False)
                                        item.Item("Pass") = KeyenceResult
                                    End If
                                Next
                            End If

                            scannerold = receivedData

                            txtOlscan.Text = scannerold

                            'Clear list
                            KeyenceOldSerials.Clear()

                            'LOAD ITEMS
                            ii = 0
                            For Each item In splitids
                                If item = "ERROR" Then

                                Else
                                    Dim elements() = item.Split(":")

                                    If elements.Length = 2 Then
                                        KeyenceOldSerials.Add(elements(0).Trim())
                                    End If
                                End If

                                ii += 1
                            Next

                            ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Scanner_Items.AcceptChanges()
                        End If
                    End If
                End If

            End If
        End If


        If KeyenceRestart Then
            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty < ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_GoalQty Then
                tmrKeyence.Start()
            End If
        End If
    End Sub


    Private Sub tmrKeyence_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrKeyence.Tick
        txtBoxID.Enabled = False
        'btnaddm.Enabled = False

        tmrKeyence.Stop()

        ReceivedDataWrite(KeyenceReader.ExecCommand("LON", 1000))

        If Math.Abs((KeyenceDatetimeLast - DateTime.Now).TotalSeconds) > 4 Then
            Dim listControls As List(Of Control) = New List(Of Control)()

            For Each control As Control In flpPositions.Controls
                listControls.Add(control)
            Next

            For Each control As Control In listControls
                flpPositions.Controls.Remove(control)
                control.Dispose()
            Next
        End If
    End Sub
