            End If

            If ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container <> "" Then
                BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE PD_tbl_units_packed SET IsComplete = 1,Complete_Date=GETDATE(),Container_ID_Packout='" & ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container & "'  WHERE boxid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID & "'  and DelDate is null")
            End If

            If ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container = "" Then
                BeConn.InsertRecords("INSERT INTO [dbo].[Part_Operation_Packout_WithoutPlex] ([TrnDate] ,[BoxID]) VALUES (GETDATE(),'" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID & "')")
            Else
                If ExData.Selected_Area.DS_Record_Production_Record.Contains("," & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & ",") Then

                    Dim dsre As DataSource_Result = ds_Container_Get1(ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container)

                    If dsre.Dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                        Dim Note As String = dsre.Dt.Rows(0).Item("Note")

                        If Note.Contains(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID) Then

                        Else
                            Dim status As String = dsre.Dt.Rows(0).Item("Container_Status")

                            ds_Container_Update_Status(ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container, status, 0, "A -" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID)
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            End If

            'PrintID
            IsCompleted = True

            Print_BoxLabels(True)

            changes_made = True
            Me.Close()
        Else
            'No hacer nada

        End If
    End Sub


    Public selectnewboxatExit As Boolean = False

    Public Async Function updatedata() As Task



        '◘ Change counters values
        lblBoxCount.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty
        lblBoxTotal.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_GoalQty
        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty > ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_GoalQty Then
            pbar.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_GoalQty
        Else
            pbar.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty
        End If

        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty = 1 Then

            '2020-05-19 EM: Print label at first unit in order to indentify box.
            'Print_BoxLabels(True)

        End If

        'Lock buffer if is required.
        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel Then
            'Review 
            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty + ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel > ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_GoalQty Then
                chbuffer.Checked = True
                chbuffer.Enabled = False
            End If
        End If

        lblContainerID.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrenPlex & " (" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrenPlexQtyUsed & "/" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrenPlexQuantity & ")"

        'Layers draws
        Await Layers_Drawing_Async()

        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_GoalQty Then

PVS_GetContainerSerial:
            'GR BOX COMPLETE...
            'MsgBox(ExData.BoxID & "-" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty & "/" & ExData.GoalQty, MsgBoxStyle.OkOnly, My.Resources.Messages.boxcomplete)
            'Check IMEI EMAIL

            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PVS_IMEI_Email = True And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_oldDB <> "" Then
                sendimeiemail(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID)
            End If

            '◘ TODO Update box to complete!
            Packout_Desactive()

            'Request by PLEX COMPLETE... 
            Dim plexpackout As String = ""
            'Get serial using PLEX
            If ExData.Selected_Area.DS_Record_Production_Record.Contains("," & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & ",") And ExData.Packout_Type = 1 Then
                'Hacer Transacción...

                Dim temp_workcenter As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Selected

                ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container = plexpackout

                ExData.frm_loading_title = "Record Plex"
                ExData.frm_loading_step = "Loading container to workcenter"
                ExData.frm_loading_Step_n = 20
                ExData.frm_loading_message = "Verificando Containers de PLEX"

                Dim PleaseWaitForm = New frm_a_d_msgLoadingPlex
                PleaseWaitForm.Show()
                PleaseWaitForm.updatedata()
                System.Windows.Forms.Application.DoEvents()

                Dim dt_pack As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [SSN],[SSNQty],[Container_ID],Container_ID_Qty FROM [dbo].[PD_tbl_units_packed] WHERE boxid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID & "'  and DelDate is null")

                Dim distinctDT As DataTable = dt_pack.DefaultView.ToTable(True, "Container_ID")

                For Each row In distinctDT.Rows
                    Try
                        If row.item("Container_ID").ToString.Length > 3 Then
                            ExFunctions.Move_ToWorkcenter(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Selected, row.item("Container_ID"), "", False)
                        End If
                    Catch ex As Exception

                    End Try
                Next

                ExData.frm_loading_title = "Record Plex"
                ExData.frm_loading_step = "Creating new container"
                ExData.frm_loading_Step_n = 80
                ExData.frm_loading_message = "Verificando Containers de PLEX"
                PleaseWaitForm.updatedata()
                System.Windows.Forms.Application.DoEvents()

                Dim goods As Double = 0
                Try

                    goods = dt_pack.Compute("Sum(SSNQty)", "")

                    ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container = ""

                    Dim alltransaction As Boolean = True

                    If ExData.CONF_Plex_Recursive_Transactions = False Then
                        alltransaction = False
                    End If

                    Await BePlex.Do_Transaction_RecursiveAsync(alltransaction, True, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Part_No, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Operation_Code, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Selected, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Building_Key, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobNumber, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Plex_Serials.Seriales, goods)

                    Try
                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Clear()
                    Catch ex As Exception

                    End Try

                Catch ex As Exception

                End Try

                PleaseWaitForm.Close()

                Dim dt_details As DataSource_Result = ds_Container_Get(ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container)

                If dt_details.Dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                    If dt_details.Dt.Rows(0).Item("Quantity") = goods Then

                    Else
                        MsgBox("Error con la cantidad. Contenendor (" & ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container & "). Ingresar contenedor manualmente. Consulta a tu supervisor!")

                        ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container = plexpackout
                        ShowFormBig(New frm_PVS_boxComplete)
                    End If
                Else
                    MsgBox("Error con la cantidad. Contenendor (" & ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container & ") no existe. Ingresar contenedor manualmente. Consulta a tu supervisor!")

                    ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container = plexpackout
                    ShowFormBig(New frm_PVS_boxComplete)
                End If

            Else
                If BeConn.GetBooleanFromQuery("SELECT [StationID] FROM [Part_Operation_Packout_SkipCloseBox] WHERE StationID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & "'") Then
                    ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container = ""
                Else
                    MsgBox("Ingresar contenedor manualmente. Consulta a tu supervisor!")

                    'Solicitar etiqueta de cierre....
                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartNumber.StartsWith("9R") Then
                        ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container = plexpackout
                        ShowFormBig(New frm_PVS_boxCompleteRMA)
                    Else
                        ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container = plexpackout
                        ShowFormBig(New frm_PVS_boxComplete)
                    End If
                End If
            End If

            If ExData.Selected_Area.DS_Record_Production_Record.Contains("," & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & ",") And BeConn.GetBoolean("SELECT CAST([Result] as bit) FROM [CF_idt_defaults] WHERE Description='Production_Packout_ConfirmLabel'") Then
                If ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID = ExData.CONF_packout_area_id And ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container.Length > 4 Then
                    Dim dt_validation As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT  Part_Operation_Shipping_Label_Validator.AutoID, Part_Operation_Shipping_Label_Validator.PartID, Part_Operation_Shipping_Label_Validator.Side, Part_Operation_Shipping_Label_Validator.BinID, Part_Operation_Shipping_Label_Validator.SortNo, isnull(Part_Operation_Shipping_Label_Validator.PictURL,'') as PictURL, Part_Operation_Shipping_Label_Validator.FormatEasy, Part_Operation_Shipping_Label_Validator.FormatHard, Part_Operation_Shipping_Label_Validator.Description, Part_Operation_Shipping_Label_Validator.ValidationType, CS_idt_partnumbers.PartNumber FROM            Part_Operation_Shipping_Label_Validator INNER JOIN CS_idt_partnumbers ON Part_Operation_Shipping_Label_Validator.PartID = CS_idt_partnumbers.PartID where CS_idt_partnumbers.PartNumber='" + ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartNumber + "'")

                    If dt_validation.Rows.Count > 0 Then

                        Dim continuea As Boolean = False
                        Dim cont_status As String = ""
                        Dim cont_qty As Integer = 0
                        Dim cont_pn As String = ""
                        Dim cont_Operation_Code As String = ""

                        Dim ds_containger = BePlex.ds_Container_Get1(ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container)

                        If ds_containger.Dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                            cont_status = ds_containger.Dt.Rows(0).Item("Container_Status")
                            cont_qty = ds_containger.Dt.Rows(0).Item("Quantity")
                            cont_pn = ds_containger.Dt.Rows(0).Item("Part_No_Revision")
                            cont_Operation_Code = ds_containger.Dt.Rows(0).Item("Operation_Code")
                            continuea = True

                            If cont_status <> "OK" Then
                                MsgBox("Invalid Status / Estatus invalido")
                                ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container = ""
                                continuea = False
                            End If

                            If cont_qty <> ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty Then
                                MsgBox("Invalid Quantity / Invalid Quantity")
                                ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container = ""
                                continuea = False
                            End If

                            If cont_pn.Contains(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartNumber) = False Then
                                MsgBox("Invalid PN / PN invalido")
                                ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container = ""
                                continuea = False
                            End If
                        Else
                            MsgBox("Invalid Serial No / Serial invalido")
                            ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container = ""
                        End If

                        If continuea Then
                            ds_Container_Update_Status(ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container, "LABEL CONFIRM", 6065, "Move due CS2 request (Packout).")
                        End If
                    End If

                End If
            End If

            If ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container <> "" Then
                BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE PD_tbl_units_packed SET IsComplete = 1,Complete_Date=GETDATE(),Container_ID_Packout='" & ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container & "'  WHERE boxid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID & "'  and DelDate is null")
            End If

            'Dim dt As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("UPDATE PD_tbl_units_packed SET IsComplete = 1,Complete_Date=GETDATE(),Container_ID_Packout='" & ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container & "'  WHERE boxid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID & "'  and DelDate is null")

            If ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container = "" Then
                BeConn.InsertRecords("INSERT INTO [dbo].[Part_Operation_Packout_WithoutPlex] ([TrnDate] ,[BoxID]) VALUES (GETDATE(),'" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID & "')")
            Else
                If ExData.Selected_Area.DS_Record_Production_Record.Contains("," & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & ",") Then

                    Dim dsre As DataSource_Result = ds_Container_Get1(ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container)

                    If dsre.Dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                        Dim Note As String = dsre.Dt.Rows(0).Item("Note")

                        If Note.Contains(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID) Then

                        Else
                            Dim status As String = dsre.Dt.Rows(0).Item("Container_Status")

                            ds_Container_Update_Status(ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container, status, 0, "A -" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID)
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            End If

            'PrintID
            IsCompleted = True

            Print_BoxLabels(True)

            changes_made = True

            selectnewboxatExit = True

        ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrenPlexQuantity Then
            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrenPlexQtyUsed >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrenPlexQuantity Then
                Dim cerrar As Integer
                ExData.MsgMensaje = My.Resources.Messages.containercomplete
                ExData.MsgTitle = "Error"
                Dim SelectorDialog As New frm_PVS_containerRequired
                SelectorDialog.ShowDialog()
                Dim result As String = SelectorDialog.Result() : SelectorDialog = Nothing : cerrar = CInt(Int(result))
                If cerrar > 1 Then
                    Packout_Activate_2()
                Else
                    Packout_Desactive()
                End If
            End If
        End If

        txtBoxID.Text = ""
        txtBoxID.Select()

    End Function

    Private Sub BtnContinue_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnContinue.Click

        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_ClientOrServer = "LJ-S800 Scanner" Then

            Dim SSN_To_TCPI As String = txtBoxID.Text.Replace("'", "").ToUpper

            SendCommandAndReceiveResponse_VISIONAsync_manual(SSN_To_TCPI)

        ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_TCPIP_ClientOrServer = "VS-L160CX" Then

            Dim SSN_To_TCPI As String = txtBoxID.Text.Replace("'", "").ToUpper

            SendCommandAndReceiveResponse_VISION_L160CXAsync_manual(SSN_To_TCPI)

        Else


            Dim ssn As String = txtBoxID.Text.Replace("'", "").ToUpper

            processsn(ssn, False)
        End If
    End Sub

    Public Sub processsn(ssn As String, Is_Rabbit As Boolean, Optional Is_Preview As Boolean = False)
        If ExFunctions.ValidSSN(ssn) = False Then
            If Is_Rabbit = False And Is_Preview = False Then
                ExFunctions.ShowMSG("Invalid characters. Check scanner setup. / Caracteres invalidos. Verificar setup de escaner.", My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid)
                txtBoxID.Text = "" : txtBoxID.Select()
            End If
        Else
            ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Clear()

            ExFunctions.CloseOpenTickets(ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Main)

            'Dim ignore_calculatelayer As Boolean = False
            '◘ Add to current box 
            'TODO
            Dim ConnectionString As String = ExData.ConnectionString
            Dim Connection As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection(ConnectionString)

            ' Primer candado: Serial no este vacio
            'txtboxid.Enabled = False
            If ssn = "" Then
                If Is_Rabbit = False And Is_Preview = False Then
                    ShowMSG(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_empty, My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid)
                    'ignore_calculatelayer = True
                    txtBoxID.Text = "" : txtBoxID.Select()
                End If
            Else
                If ssn.Length > 5 Then
                    '◘ Si es una plex agregarla a la caja...
                    If ssn.Substring(0, 3) = "(S)" And Is_Rabbit = False And Is_Preview = False Then
                        'ES una plex
                        Dim str As String
                        Dim strArr() As String
                        Dim count As Integer
                        str = ssn
                        strArr = str.Split("(")

                        Dim partnumber As String = ""
                        Dim qtyty As Integer = 0
                        Dim Serial As String = ""

                        For count = 0 To strArr.Length - 1
                            If strArr(count).Length > 2 Then
                                If strArr(count).Substring(0, 1) = "S" Then
                                    Serial = strArr(count).Substring(2).Replace(" ", "")
                                ElseIf strArr(count).Substring(0, 1) = "Q" Then
                                    qtyty = strArr(count).Substring(2)
                                ElseIf strArr(count).Substring(0, 1) = "P" Then
                                    partnumber = strArr(count).Substring(2).Replace(" ", "")
                                End If
                            End If
                        Next

                        'TODO
                        txtBoxID.Text = "" : txtBoxID.Select()
                    Else
                        Dim capacitorlabel As Boolean = True


                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Capacitor_Request Then
                            capacitorlabel = False
                            Dim dt_packcapacitors As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [SerialFormat],[SerialFormatEasy],[Title] FROM [CS_tbl_partnumber_pack_capacitors] WHERE PartID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "'")

                                ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Capacitor_Request_SSN = ssn

                                ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Capacitor_Request_Title = dt_packcapacitors.Rows(Componentcounter).Item(2)
                                Dim optionscap As New frm_PVS_capacitorAdd

                                Componentcounter += 1
                            Next

                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Capacitor_Request_OK Then
                                capacitorlabel = True
                            End If
                        End If


                        Dim regex1 As Regex
                        regex1 = New Regex(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartIdFormat)
                        Dim match1 As Match = regex1.Match(ssn)

                        'IF MATCH WITH PART NO AND SECOND LABEL OR IF TIPE IS 4: ONLY PRINT BOX AND IGNORE TRACKING
                        If (match1.Success And capacitorlabel) Or (ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_style_SsnType = 4 And ssn.StartsWith("AUTO")) Then


#Region "Nuevo CODIGO"

#Region "Old CODIGO"

                            'For each child check if is duplicate...
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel = True Then

                                'If is by panel search by virtual master label (Parent)
                                Dim ssnParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                        {
                                            New SqlParameter("@ssn", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssn}
                                        }

                                ssn = BeConn.GetString("Select parente from PD_tbl_parents_smt where child=@ssn", ssnParameter)

                                'Verify Qty not overload the box....

                                For i As Integer = 1 To ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel
                                    'ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows.Add(ssn, ssn, IsGood, -1, IsRework, 1, stageactual)
                                    ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows.Add(ssn, ssn, 1, -1, 0, 1, -1, ssn, "")
                                Next

                                '2020-02-20
                                'If ExData.isByPanelWithChilds Then
                                'IsSerializado
                                Dim dt As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT Child FROM PD_tbl_parents_smt WHERE parente=@ssn", ssnParameter)

                                If dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then

                                    '2020-02-28 EM: Delte extra rows. 
                                    If dt.Rows.Count < ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel Then
                                        dt.Clear()
                                        For ji As Integer = 1 To dt.Rows.Count
                                            'ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows.Add(ssn, ssn, IsGood, -1, IsRework, 1, stageactual)
                                            ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows.Add(ssn, ssn, 1, -1, 0, 1, -1, ssn, "")
                                        Next
                                    End If

                                    Dim i As Integer = 0
                                    For Each row In dt.Rows
                                        'Cambio el serial e indico que es hijo...
                                        ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows(i).Item(1) = row.item(0)
                                        ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows(i).Item(5) = 0
                                        ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows(i).Item(7) = row.item(0)

                                        i += 1
                                    Next
                                Else
                                    If Is_Rabbit = False And Is_Preview = False Then
                                        ShowMSG(My.Resources.Messages.merge_panel_incomplete, My.Resources.Messages.merge_panel_incomplete_title)
                                    End If
                                End If

                                Dim stageactual As Integer = 0

                            Else
                                'Otro Caso...
                                ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows.Add("N/A", ssn, 1, -1, 0, 0, 0, ssn, "")
                            End If

                            For Each son As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows


                                '2020-09-25 EM: Extr ssn

                                Dim ssn_sup As String = son.Item(7)

                                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Subsstring <> "0,0" Then
                                    Try
                                        Dim spliter() = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Subsstring.Split(",")

                                    Catch ex As Exception

                                    End Try

                                                                New SqlParameter("@ToolID_1", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Tool_Name_ID}
                                                            }

                                    BeConn.InsertRecords("INSERT INTO [dbo].[PD_tbl_units_tracking] (PartID,IsGood,DefectCodeID,IsRework,StationID,TrnDate,JobID,JobType,JobNumber,JobSide,SSNPanel,SSN,ControlID,AreaID,SSNIndex,Shift,GroupMLS,SetupID,Comments,ContainerID,SSNQty,ToolID_1) VALUES (@PartID,@IsGood,@DefectCodeID,@IsRework,@StationID,GETDATE(),@JobID,@JobType,@JobNumber,@JobSide,@SSNPanel,@SSN,@ControlID,@AreaID,@SSNIndex,@Shift,@GroupMLS,@SetupID,@Comments,@ContainerID,@SSNQty,@ToolID_1)", insertParameter)


                                    'DISABLE UNIT IN WIP
                                    BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE PD_tbl_units_wip  SET IsGood='" _
                                                                                        & 1 & "',DefectCodeID='" & -1 & "',TrnDate=GETDATE(),IsRework='" _
                                                                                        & 0 & "',ControlID='" _
                                                                                        & ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID & "',StationID='" _
                                                                                        & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & "', StatusAreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "', JobSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "',stageid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID & "',IsActive=0  WHERE SSN='" & son.Item(7) & "'")

                                    Try
                                        BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE PD_tbl_units_wip  SET IsGood='" _
                                                                                        & 1 & "',DefectCodeID='" & -1 & "',TrnDate=GETDATE(),IsRework='" _
                                                                                        & 0 & "',ControlID='" _
                                                                                        & ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID & "',StationID='" _
                                                                                        & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & "', StatusAreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "', JobSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "',stageid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID & "',IsActive=0  WHERE SSN='" & ssn_sub & "'")

                                        BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE PD_tbl_units_wip  SET IsGood='" _
                                                                                            & 1 & "',DefectCodeID='" & -1 & "',TrnDate=GETDATE(),IsRework='" _
                                                                                            & 0 & "',ControlID='" _
                                                                                            & ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID & "',StationID='" _
                                                                                            & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & "', StatusAreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "', JobSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "',stageid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID & "',IsActive=0  WHERE SSN='" & ssn_sup & "'")
                                    Catch ex As Exception

                                    End Try

                                    'CHECK FOR CONVETION TO DISBLE TOO...

                                    Try
                                        Dim dt_conversion As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [Child_SSN] FROM [PD_tbl_units_conversion] where ssn='" & son.Item(7) & "'")

                                        For Each convesion In dt_conversion.Rows

                                            BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE PD_tbl_units_wip  SET IsGood='" _
                                                                                        & 1 & "',DefectCodeID='" & -1 & "',TrnDate=GETDATE(),IsRework='" _
                                                                                        & 0 & "',ControlID='" _
                                                                                        & ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID & "',StationID='" _
                                                                                        & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & "', StatusAreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "', JobSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "',stageid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID & "',IsActive=0  WHERE SSN='" & convesion.Item(0) & "'")
                                        Next
                                    Catch ex As Exception

                                    End Try

                                    'CHECK FOR LINKAGE TO DISBLE TOO...
                                    Try
                                        Dim dt_conversion As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [Child_SSN] FROM [PD_tbl_units_linkage] where ssn='" & son.Item(7) & "'")

                                        For Each convesion In dt_conversion.Rows
                                            BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE PD_tbl_units_wip  SET IsGood='" _
                                                                                        & 1 & "',DefectCodeID='" & -1 & "',TrnDate=GETDATE(),IsRework='" _
                                                                                        & 0 & "',ControlID='" _
                                                                                        & ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID & "',StationID='" _
                                                                                        & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & "', StatusAreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "', JobSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "',stageid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID & "',IsActive=0  WHERE SSN='" & convesion.Item(0) & "'")
                                        Next
                                    Catch ex As Exception

                                    End Try

                                    '[SQL Add] PD_tbl_units_packed
                                    BeConn.InsertRecords("INSERT INTO PD_tbl_units_packed ([PartID] ,[StationID] ,[TrnDate] ,[SSN] ,[SSNQty] ,[ControlID] ,[AreaID] ,[Shift] ,[BoxID] ,[IsComplete] ,[PackTypeID] ,[Container_ID] ,[Container_ID_Shipper],Container_ID_Qty,LayerCode,[SSN_Sub],[SSN_Sup]) VALUES ('" _
                                                        & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "','" _
                                                        & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & "',GETDATE(),'" _
                                                        & son.Item(1) & "','" _
                                                        & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_style_ssnqty & "','" _
                                                        & ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID & "','" _
                                                        & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "','" _
                                                        & shift & "','" _
                                                        & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID & "','" _
                                                        & "0" & "','" _
                                                        & ExData.Packout_Type & "','" _
                                                        & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrenPlex & "','" _
                                                        & "" & "','" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrenPlexQuantity & "','" & CurrentLayerSerial & "','" & ssn_sub & "','" & ssn_sup & "')")

                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Print_Extra_LabelID > -1 Then
                                        ExFunctions.PrintExtraLabel(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Print_Extra_LabelID, son.Item(1))
                                    End If

                                    BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE PD_idt_stations SET IsActive='True',DownTimeCodeID='80',LastPieceTime=GETDATE(),LastPartID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "',LastJob='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobID & "',LastJobType='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobType & "',LastJobText='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobText & "',LastSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "',LastBinId='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.BinID & "' WHERE StationID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & "'")

                                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrenPlexQtyUsed += ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_style_ssnqty

                                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty += ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_style_ssnqty

                                    ExData.CurrentLayerQty += ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_style_ssnqty

                                    'Dim R As DataRow = ExData.Selected_Area.LastSerials.NewRow
                                    'R("SSN") = son.Item(7) : R("TrnDate") = Dia

                                    Dim R As DataRow = ExData.Selected_Area.LastSerials.NewRow
                                    R("Serial") = son.Item(7) : R("Hora") = Dia : R("IsGood") = 1
                                    ExData.Selected_Area.LastSerials.Rows.InsertAt(R, 0)

                                    Data_lastserials.DataSource = ExData.Selected_Area.LastSerials
                                    If Data_lastserials.RowCount > 0 Then
                                        Data_lastserials.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex = 0
                                    End If
                                    txtmsg.Text = My.Resources.Messages.prod_success
                                    txtmsg.ForeColor = Color.FromArgb(0, 191, 1)
                                    txtmsg.BackColor = Color.Honeydew
                                Next

                                txtBoxID.Text = "" : txtBoxID.Select()
                                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.NeedPrintUnit Then
                                    txtPrintIndividual.Text = ""
                                    txtPrintIndividual.Select()
                                End If
                            Else
                                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Defectos(0) <= 0 Then
                                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Defectos(0) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DefaultDefectsQty(0)
                                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LockDepartmentSel = 1
                                    ExData.PNSeleccionado = 1
                                    If ExData.req_lockstation And (ExData.Selected_Area.Area_AbleLock Or ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Station_AbleToLock) Then
                                        ShowFormBig(New frm_a_d_unlockFiveDefects)
                                    End If
                                End If

                                If Is_Rabbit = False And Is_Preview = False Then
                                    txtBoxID.Text = "" : txtBoxID.Select()
                                End If
                            End If

                        Else

                            If Is_Preview Then
                                ExData.Packout_Preview_Result = "NOPASA"

                                KeyenceResult = False
                                ShowMSG("Position " & KeyencePosition & " | '" & ssn & "' | " & My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartIdFormat, My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid)
                            End If

                            '◘ NO Concide con el modelo
                            If Is_Rabbit = False And Is_Preview = False Then
                                Dim dt_email As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT  isnull(AspNetUsers_2.Name,'') AS PRODUCT_email FROM Common_CFT INNER JOIN
                                 CS_idt_external_customers ON Common_CFT.CFT_ID = CS_idt_external_customers.CFT_ID LEFT JOIN
                                 AspNetUsers ON Common_CFT.PM = AspNetUsers.Id LEFT JOIN
                                 AspNetUsers AS AspNetUsers_1 ON Common_CFT.QA = AspNetUsers_1.Id LEFT JOIN
                                 AspNetUsers AS AspNetUsers_2 ON Common_CFT.PRODUCT = AspNetUsers_2.Id LEFT JOIN
                                 AspNetUsers AS AspNetUsers_3 ON Common_CFT.BUYER = AspNetUsers_3.Id LEFT JOIN
                                 AspNetUsers AS AspNetUsers_4 ON Common_CFT.TEST = AspNetUsers_4.Id 
						         WHERE CustomerID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CustomerID & "'")

                                Dim responsable As String = ""
                                If dt_email.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                    responsable = dt_email.Rows(0).Item(0)
                                Else
                                    responsable = BeConn.GetString("SELECT [Result] FROM [CF_idt_defaults] WHERE Description='Admin_Name'")
                                End If

                                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel Then
                                    KeyenceResult = False
                                    ShowMSG("Position " & KeyencePosition & " | " & My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PanelPartIdFormat.Substring(1, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PanelPartIdFormat.Length - 2) & My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format_own & responsable, My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid)
                                Else
                                    KeyenceResult = False
                                    ShowMSG("Position " & KeyencePosition & " | " & My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartIdFormat & My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format_own & responsable, My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid)
                                End If
                                txtBoxID.Text = "" : txtBoxID.Select()

                            ElseIf Is_Rabbit = False And Is_Preview = True Then


                            End If
                        End If
                    End If

                Else
                    If Is_Preview Then
                        ExData.Packout_Preview_Result = "NOPASA"
                    End If

                    ' Si el serial es muy corto
                    If Is_Rabbit = False And Is_Preview = False Then
                        saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_shortage, ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                        txtBoxID.Text = "" : txtBoxID.Select()
                        ShowMSG(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_shortage, My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid)
                    End If
                End If
            End If

            'ExFunctions.SelectedSet(1)

            If Is_Rabbit = False And Is_Preview = False Then
                Layers_Calculate()

                Dim unused = updatedata()

                If pnlGage.Enabled = True And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty < ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_GoalQty Then
                    Me.tmrCognexGage.Start()
                End If
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

#Region "To print"
    Dim mRow As Integer = 0
    Dim newpage As Boolean = True
    Dim numPage As Integer = 1
    Dim totalPage As Integer = 0

    Dim dtcf As DataTable

    Dim currentcert As Integer = 1

    Public Sub Print_BoxLabels(Iscomplete As Boolean, Optional ignorecof As Boolean = False)

        totalPage = 1

        Dim dtCertifications As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [AutoID],[PartID],[TrnDate],[TrnDue],[Description],[Enable] FROM [QA_tbl_pack_certifications] where partid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "'")

        If dtCertifications.Rows.Count > 0 Then
            totalPage += 1
            If dtCertifications.Rows.Count > 5 Then
                totalPage += 1
            End If
        End If

        'PRINT BOX LABEL....
        Dim PLEXCONTAINER As String = ""

        Try
            Dim da_ser As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("Select Container_ID_Packout,Container_ID_Qty,SSN,SSNQty,TrnDate,partid,BoxID From PD_tbl_units_packed WHERE (boxid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID & "') and deldate is null order by trndate desc")

            If da_ser.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                PLEXCONTAINER = da_ser.Rows(0).Item("Container_ID_Packout")
                Dim da_StanQty As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("Select BoxSize,Layers,PartSerialFormat,PackType,PiecesByPanel,PartNumber,partid From CS_idt_partnumbers WHERE PartID='" & da_ser.Rows(0).Item(5) & "'")

                If da_StanQty.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                    Dim zplbox As String = ExFunctions.Get_ZPL_Packout(da_ser.Rows(0).Item("BoxID"), da_ser.Rows(0).Item("Container_ID_Packout"), da_StanQty.Rows(0).Item(5), da_ser.Compute("SUM(SSNQty)", "SSNQty>0"), Iscomplete)

                    Dim printrequired As Integer = 1

                    Dim printrequiredpartid As Integer = BeConn.GetInteger("Select Quantity FROM Part_Operation_Packout_Print_BoxID_Quantity WHERE PartID='" & da_ser.Rows(0).Item(5) & "'")

                    If printrequiredpartid > 0 Then
                        printrequired = printrequiredpartid
                    End If

                    For iprint As Integer = 1 To printrequired
                        BeZebraPrint.SendStringToPrinter(ExData.PRINTER_2_Name, zplbox)
                    Next
                End If
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        '2023-08-01 Print PLEX Packout labels
        Dim dtPlexLabels As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [Printer_Name],[Printer_IP],[Copies] FROM [Part_Operation_Packout_PrintPlexLabel] WHERE [Part_Key]='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Part_Key & "'")
        If dtPlexLabels.Rows.Count > 0 And PLEXCONTAINER.Length > 0 Then
            Dim printerName As String = dtPlexLabels.Rows(0).Item("Printer_Name")
            Dim copies As Integer = dtPlexLabels.Rows(0).Item("Copies")
            Dim zcode As String = BePlex.ds_Get_Container_label(PLEXCONTAINER, False)

            If zcode.Length > 0 Then

                Dim labelno As Integer = -1
                Try
                    labelno = CInt(1)
                Catch ex As Exception

                End Try

                Dim partnumber As String = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartNumber

                Dim qty_copies As Integer = 1
                Try
                    Dim zcodeqty As Integer = zcode.ToString().IndexOf("^PQ")
                    Dim zcode_substring As String = zcode.ToString().Substring(zcodeqty + 3)
                    Dim textos() = zcode_substring.Split("^")
                    qty_copies = CInt(textos(0))

                    'Replace by 1
                    Dim z1 = zcode.ToString()
                    z1 = z1.Replace("^PQ" & textos(0), "^PQ1")
                    zcode = z1
                Catch ex As Exception

                End Try

                Dim TempType As String = ""
                Dim TempName As String = ""
                Dim TempIP As String = ""

                'NO NO NO
                Dim dt_ShippingPrinter As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [AreaID]
                  ,[StationID]
                  ,[PartID]
                  ,[PrinterType]
                  ,[PrinterName]
              FROM [Part_Operation_Areas_PartNo_Printer] WHERE AREAID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "' and partid=(Select partid from CS_idt_partnumbers where partnumber='" & partnumber & "') and StationID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & "'")

                If dt_ShippingPrinter.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                    TempName = dt_ShippingPrinter.Rows(0).Item(4)
                    TempType = dt_ShippingPrinter.Rows(0).Item(3)
                    TempIP = dt_ShippingPrinter.Rows(0).Item(4)
                End If

                For ii As Integer = 1 To copies

                    'Print Operation Label 
                    If labelno > -1 Then
                        If TempType <> "" Then
                            If ExData.SHIPPING_SerialLabelValidate_include_numbers Then
                                BePlex.printcom_custom(TempType, TempName, TempIP, "^PW832" & zcode, "^FD" & PLEXCONTAINER & "-" & partnumber, "-" & CInt(labelno))
                            Else
                                BePlex.printcom_custom(TempType, TempName, TempIP, "^PW832" & zcode, "^FD" & PLEXCONTAINER & "-" & partnumber, "")
                            End If
                        Else
                            If ExData.SHIPPING_SerialLabelValidate_include_numbers Then
                                BePlex.printcom_custom(ExData.PRINTER_1_Type, printerName, ExData.PRINTER_1_IP, "^PW832" & zcode, "^FD" & PLEXCONTAINER & "-" & partnumber, "-" & CInt(labelno))
                            Else
                                BePlex.printcom_custom(ExData.PRINTER_1_Type, printerName, ExData.PRINTER_1_IP, "^PW832" & zcode, "^FD" & PLEXCONTAINER & "-" & partnumber, "")
                            End If
                        End If
                    End If

                    BeZebraPrint.SendStringToPrinter(printerName, zcode)
                Next
            End If
        End If

        'PRINT LABELS UNITS SSN
        Dim dt_SSNlist As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [PartID] ,[FormatID] ,[PrinterIP] ,[PrinterName] ,[ZPL_Code] ,[UnitPerSheet] FROM [Part_Operation_Packout_Print_SSN_List] WHERE PartID in (SELECT [PartID] FROM [PD_tbl_units_packed] WHERE BoxID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID & "')")

        If dt_SSNlist.Rows.Count > 0 Then
            ExFunctions.OsramLabels(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID)
        End If

        'PRINT Part_Operation_Packout_Print_Label_Extra EXTRA LABELS

        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Labels.Rows.Count > 0 Then

            For Each labelrow As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Labels.Rows
                If labelrow.Item("ZPL_Code") <> "" And labelrow.Item("PrinterName") <> "" Then
                    Dim ZPLCode As String = labelrow.Item("ZPL_Code")

                    ZPLCode = ExFunctions.ZPL_Update(ZPLCode, "$SERIAL$", ExData.PVS_CloseBox_Container)
                    ZPLCode = ExFunctions.ZPL_Update(ZPLCode, "$QTY$", ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty)
                    ZPLCode = ExFunctions.ZPL_Update(ZPLCode, "$DATEYYYYMMDD$", DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMdd"))

                    Try
                        BeZebraPrint.SendStringToPrinter(labelrow.Item("PrinterName"), ZPLCode)
                    Catch ex As Exception

                    End Try
                End If
            Next

        End If

        'PRINT CERTIFICATIONS!
        If dtCertifications.Rows.Count > 1 Then

            numPage += 1

            dtcf = New DataTable
            dtcf = dtCertifications
            Try
                For Each printer In PrinterUtility2.GetDefaultPrinters()
                    If PrinterUtility2.IsOnline(printer) Then
                        Dim prn As New Printing.PrintDocument
                        Using (prn)
                            currentcert = 0
                            If printer("Name") = ExData.PRINTER_1_Name Or printer("Name") = ExData.PRINTER_2_Name Then
                                prn.PrinterSettings.PrinterName = printer("Name")
                                If prn.PrinterSettings.IsValid Then
                                    'prn.PrinterSettings.PrinterName = "Zebra"
                                    AddHandler prn.PrintPage, AddressOf Me.PrintCofC
                                    prn.Print()
                                    RemoveHandler prn.PrintPage, AddressOf PrintCofC
                                End If
                            End If

                        End Using
                    End If
                Next
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Try
                For ii As Integer = 0 To 4
                    dtCertifications.Rows(0).Delete()
                    dtCertifications.AcceptChanges()
                Next
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Try
                If dtCertifications.Rows.Count >= 1 Then

                    For Each printer In PrinterUtility2.GetDefaultPrinters()
                        If PrinterUtility2.IsOnline(printer) Then
                            Dim prn As New Printing.PrintDocument
                            Using (prn)
                                currentcert = 5
                                If printer("Name") = ExData.PRINTER_1_Name Or printer("Name") = ExData.PRINTER_2_Name Then
                                    prn.PrinterSettings.PrinterName = printer("Name")
                                    If prn.PrinterSettings.IsValid Then
                                        'prn.PrinterSettings.PrinterName = "Zebra"
                                        AddHandler prn.PrintPage, AddressOf Me.PrintCofC
                                        prn.Print()
                                        RemoveHandler prn.PrintPage, AddressOf PrintCofC
                                    End If
                                End If

                            End Using
                        End If
                    Next
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try


            Try
                For ii As Integer = 0 To 4
                    dtCertifications.Rows(0).Delete()
                    dtCertifications.AcceptChanges()
                Next
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Try
                If dtCertifications.Rows.Count >= 1 Then
                    For Each printer In PrinterUtility2.GetDefaultPrinters()
                        If PrinterUtility2.IsOnline(printer) Then
                            Dim prn As New Printing.PrintDocument
                            Using (prn)
                                currentcert = 10
                                If printer("Name") = ExData.PRINTER_1_Name Or printer("Name") = ExData.PRINTER_2_Name Then
                                    prn.PrinterSettings.PrinterName = printer("Name")
                                    If prn.PrinterSettings.IsValid Then
                                        'prn.PrinterSettings.PrinterName = "Zebra"
                                        AddHandler prn.PrintPage, AddressOf Me.PrintCofC
                                        prn.Print()
                                        RemoveHandler prn.PrintPage, AddressOf PrintCofC
                                    End If
                                End If

                            End Using
                        End If
                    Next

                End If
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try
        End If

        'PRINT MANUFACTURE ALTERNATE
        'If BeConn.GetBooleanFromQuery("SELECT [CustomerID] FROM [Part_Operation_Packout_Alternate_Customer] WHERE [CustomerID] = '" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CustomerID & "'") Or BeConn.GetBooleanFromQuery("SELECT [AutoID] FROM [Part_Operation_Packout_Alternate_PartNumber] WHERE PartID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "'") Then
        '    Dim optiosn As New frm_PVS_AlternateMPN

        '    optiosn.ShowDialog()
        'End If

        'CHECK IF NEED VALIDATE ALTERNATE PART NOS

        If BeConn.GetBooleanFromQuery("SELECT [AutoID] FROM [Part_Operation_Packout_Alternate_Customer] WHERE CustomerID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CustomerID & "'") Or BeConn.GetBooleanFromQuery("SELECT [AutoID] FROM [Part_Operation_Packout_Alternate_PartNumber] WHERE PartID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "'") Then

            'How display message in order to 

            Dim optionsal As New frm_a_d_msgAlternates

            optionsal.Show()

            Application.DoEvents()

            'GET BOM TO CEHCK IF INCLUDE THIS ATTRIBUTE
            Dim dt_pn_tocheck As DataTable = New DataTable

            dt_pn_tocheck.Columns.Add("Component", GetType(String))

            Dim dtismlscriterial As Boolean = False

            Dim dtbom As DataSource_Result = Part_Inventory_Exploded_BOM_Material_Get(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartNumber)

            For Each bomitem As DataRow In dtbom.Dt.Rows

                Dim dt_item As DataTable = ds_Part_Get_OnlyPriority(bomitem.Item("Part_No")).Dt

                If dt_item.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                    If dt_item.Rows(0).Item(0) = "MLS Critical Tracking" Then
                        dt_pn_tocheck.Rows.Add(bomitem.Item("Part_No"))
                        dtismlscriterial = True
                    End If
                End If
            Next

            If dtismlscriterial Then

                Dim dt_itemsused_e As DataTable = New DataTable
                dt_itemsused_e.Columns.Add("SSN", GetType(String))
                dt_itemsused_e.Columns.Add("Part_No", GetType(String))
                dt_itemsused_e.Columns.Add("Serial_No", GetType(String))
                dt_itemsused_e.Columns.Add("MPN", GetType(String))
                dt_itemsused_e.Columns.Add("MPN_Serial", GetType(String))


                Dim havealternate As Boolean = False

                Dim dt_serialsinbox As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [SSN] FROM [PD_tbl_units_packed] Where BoxID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID & "' and DelDate is null")

                Dim alternateqty As Integer = 0

                For Each serial As DataRow In dt_serialsinbox.Rows

                    Dim dt_childs As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [Child_SSN] FROM [PD_tbl_units_linkage] WHERE SSN='" & serial.Item(0) & "'")

                    Dim dt_itemsused As DataTable = New DataTable
                    dt_itemsused.Columns.Add("SSN", GetType(String))
                    dt_itemsused.Columns.Add("Part_No", GetType(String))
                    dt_itemsused.Columns.Add("Serial_No", GetType(String))
                    dt_itemsused.Columns.Add("MPN", GetType(String))
                    dt_itemsused.Columns.Add("MPN_Serial", GetType(String))

                    'Check if serial pass for SMT... Check Boot Sides!

                    For iside As Integer = 1 To 2

                        Dim sidetocheck As String = "A"

                        If iside = 2 Then
                            sidetocheck = "B"
                        End If

                        Dim setup_id_a As Integer = BeConn.GetInteger("SELECT isnull([SetupID],0) FROM [PD_tbl_units_tracking] where ssn='" & serial.Item(0) & "' and areaid='1' and jobside='" & sidetocheck & "'")

                        If setup_id_a > 0 Then
                            'GET ITEMS USED THERE......
                            Dim dt_mateiralinsetup As DataTable = GetDTFROMSetup(setup_id_a)

                            For Each item As DataRow In dt_pn_tocheck.Rows
                                Dim selection = dt_mateiralinsetup.Select("Part_No LIKE '%" & item.Item(0) & "%'")

                                If selection.Length > 0 Then
                                    For Each itemselection In selection
                                        dt_itemsused.Rows.Add(serial.Item(0), itemselection(0), itemselection(1), "", "")
                                    Next
                                End If
                            Next
                        End If

                        'Check if linkage (merge with others)...

                        For Each child As DataRow In dt_childs.Rows
                            Dim setup_id_c As Integer = BeConn.GetInteger("SELECT isnull([SetupID],0) FROM [PD_tbl_units_tracking] where ssn='" & child.Item(0) & "' and areaid='1' and jobside='" & sidetocheck & "'")

                            If setup_id_c > 0 Then
                                'GET ITEMS USED THERE......
                                Dim dt_mateiralinsetup As DataTable = GetDTFROMSetup(setup_id_c)

                                For Each item As DataRow In dt_pn_tocheck.Rows
                                    Dim selection = dt_mateiralinsetup.Select("Part_No LIKE '%" & item.Item(0) & "%'")

                                    If selection.Length > 0 Then
                                        For Each itemselection In selection
                                            dt_itemsused.Rows.Add(serial.Item(0) & "--" & item.Item(0), itemselection(0), itemselection(1), "", "")
                                        Next
                                    End If
                                Next
                            End If
                        Next

                        'Check conversion??
                    Next

                    'Check if is alternate any of used items
                    For Each itemused As DataRow In dt_itemsused.Rows

                        Dim defaultmpn As String = ""

                        Dim sel_pn_items = dt_itemsused_e.Select("Part_No='" & itemused.Item("Part_No") & "'")

                        If sel_pn_items.Length > 0 Then
                            defaultmpn = sel_pn_items(0).Item("MPN")
                        Else
                            Dim pppart_key As Integer = BeConn.GetInteger("SELECT [Part_Key] FROM [PART] where part_no='" & itemused.Item("Part_No") & "'")

                            Dim dsPart As DataSource_Result = ds_Manufacturer_Parts_Get(pppart_key)
                            If dsPart.Dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim selection = dsPart.Dt.Select("Primary_Supplier=1")

                                If selection.Length > 0 Then
                                    defaultmpn = selection(0).Item("MP_Part_No_Revision")
                                End If
                            Else
                                'CHeck BOM 
                                Dim dsbom As DataSource_Result = ds_Part_BOM_Components_Get(pppart_key)

                                If dsbom.Dt.Rows.Count = 1 Then

                                    If itemused.Item("Part_No").ToString().Contains(dsbom.Dt.Rows(0)("Part_No")) Then
                                        Dim pppart_key_i As Integer = dsbom.Dt.Rows(0)(0)

                                        Dim dsPart_i As DataSource_Result = ds_Manufacturer_Parts_Get(pppart_key_i)
                                        If dsPart_i.Dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                            Dim selection = dsPart_i.Dt.Select("Primary_Supplier=1")

                                            If selection.Length > 0 Then
                                                defaultmpn = selection(0).Item("MP_Part_No_Revision")
                                            End If
                                        End If
                                    End If
                                End If
                            End If
                        End If

                        Dim serialmpn As String = ""

                        Dim sel_ser_items = dt_itemsused_e.Select("Serial_No='" & itemused.Item("Serial_No") & "'")

                        If sel_ser_items.Length > 0 Then
                            serialmpn = sel_ser_items(0).Item("MPN_Serial")
                        Else
                            Dim conattri As DataSource_Result = ds_Container_Attributes_Get_OnlyManufacturer_Part_No(itemused.Item("Serial_No"))
                            If conattri.Dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                serialmpn = conattri.Dt.Rows(0).Item(0)
                            End If

                            If serialmpn = "" Then
                                'Check FROM Container... 
                                Dim fromserial = itemused.Item("Serial_No")
                                Dim iterations As Integer = 0

                                While (fromserial <> "" And iterations < 10)
                                    iterations += 1
                                    'Get from serial no
                                    Dim ds_form As DataSource_Result = ds_Container_Get_OnlyFromSN(fromserial)

                                    If ds_form.Dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                        fromserial = ds_form.Dt.Rows(0)(0)
                                    Else
                                        fromserial = ""
                                    End If

                                    'Check MPN OF NEW SERIAL
                                    Dim conattri_s As DataSource_Result = ds_Container_Attributes_Get_OnlyManufacturer_Part_No(fromserial)
                                    If conattri_s.Dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                        serialmpn = conattri_s.Dt.Rows(0).Item(0)
                                    End If

                                    If serialmpn <> "" Then
                                        fromserial = ""
                                    End If
                                End While
                            End If
                        End If

                        'Save value on table
                        itemused.Item("MPN") = defaultmpn
                        itemused.Item("MPN_Serial") = serialmpn
                        dt_itemsused.AcceptChanges()

                        If serialmpn <> defaultmpn Then
                            alternateqty += 1
                            havealternate = True
                        End If
                    Next

                    dt_itemsused_e.Merge(dt_itemsused)

                    ''Terminar ciclo
                    'If havealternate Then
                    '    Exit For
                    'End If
                Next

                alternateqty = dt_itemsused_e.AsDataView.ToTable(True, "SSN").Rows.Count

                If havealternate Then
                    'Print Label!

                    Dim serialplex As String = ""

                    Dim da_ser As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("Select Container_ID_Packout,Container_ID_Qty,SSN,SSNQty,TrnDate,partid,BoxID From PD_tbl_units_packed WHERE (boxid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_BoxID & "') and deldate is null order by trndate desc")

                    If da_ser.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                        serialplex = da_ser.Rows(0).Item("Container_ID_Packout")
                    End If

                    Dim labelcode As String = "
                        ^XA~SD23^PR4,4,4^PW609
                        ^FX Top section with logo, name and address.
                        ^CF0,60
                        ^FO50,50^FDAlternate items^FS
                        ^CF0,30
                        ^FO50,140^GB500,3,3^FS

                        ^FX Second section with recipient address and permit information.
                        ^CFA,30
                        ^FO50,170^FDThis box include material^FS
                        ^FO50,210^FDwith alternate components.^FS
                        ^FO50,250^FDContact Firstronic for more^FS
                        ^FO50,290^FDdetails.^FS

                        ^FO470,50^GB80,80,3^FS
                        ^FO490,80^FD" & alternateqty & "^FS
                        ^FO380,320^A0N,24,24^FB240,1,,L^FDSerial # " & serialplex & "^FS
                        ^BY2,3,36^FO230,348^B3N,N,,N,N^FD" & serialplex & "^FS

                        ^XZ"

                    BeZebraPrint.SendStringToPrinter(ExData.PRINTER_2_Name, labelcode)

                End If
            End If

            Try
                optionsal.Close()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try
        End If

        numPage = 1
    End Sub

    Dim fstrUnitSN As String = ""

    Public Sub PrintUnit(ByVal StrSN As String)
        fstrUnitSN = StrSN

        Dim code As String = "^XA^FO250,12^BY1^BCN,40,N,N,N^FD>;[UNITID]^FS^FO262,58^AO,14,7^FD[UNITID]^FS^XZ"

        code = code.Replace("[UNITID]", fstrUnitSN)

        'Search new code?

        Dim dt As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [ZPL_Code]  FROM [Part_Operation_Packout_PrintUnit_ZPL] WHERE PartID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "'")

        If dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then

            code = dt.Rows(0).Item(0)

            code = code.Replace("[UNITID]", fstrUnitSN)

            If code.Contains("[CONVERSION]") Then

                Dim con As String = ""

                Dim val As String = BeConn.GetString("SELECT [SSN] FROM [PD_tbl_units_conversion] WHERE Child_SSN='" & StrSN & "'")

                If val = "" Then
                    Exit Sub
                End If

                con = val

                code = code.Replace("[CONVERSION]", con)
            ElseIf code.Contains("[CONVERSION14]") Then

                Dim con As String = ""

                Dim val As String = BeConn.GetString("SELECT RIGHT([SSN],14) FROM [PD_tbl_units_conversion] WHERE Child_SSN='" & StrSN & "' order by TrnDate desc")

                If val = "" Then
                    Exit Sub
                End If

                con = val

                code = code.Replace("[CONVERSION14]", con)

            End If
        End If

        BeZebraPrint.SendStringToPrinter("UnitId_Printer", code)

        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.gagename = "" And txtBoxID.Enabled = True Then
            txtBoxID.Select()
        ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.gagename <> "" And txtBoxID.Enabled = False Then
            txtPrintIndividual.Select()
        End If

        'Dim prn As New Printing.PrintDocument
        'Try
        '    Using (prn)
        '        prn.PrinterSettings.PrinterName = "UnitId_Printer"
        '        'prn.PrinterSettings.PrinterName = "Zebra"
        '        AddHandler prn.PrintPage, AddressOf Me.PrintUnitLabel
        '        prn.Print()
        '        RemoveHandler prn.PrintPage, AddressOf PrintUnitLabel
        '    End Using
        'Catch ex As Exception
        '    MsgBox(My.Resources.Messages.Printer_By_Unit)
        'End Try

    End Sub

        ''Description
        'args.Graphics.DrawString("MODEL NO.:" & fStrModel, New Font(ArialSmall, FontStyle.Regular), Brushes.Black, 0, 15)
        'Serial Number
        args.Graphics.DrawString(fstrUnitSN, New Font(HR, FontStyle.Regular), Brushes.Black, 100, 25)
        args.Graphics.DrawString("*" & fstrUnitSN & "*", New Font(Barcode, FontStyle.Regular), Brushes.Black, 120, 8)

    End Sub

    Public Sub desactivarscaner(activaragain As Boolean)
        Try
            'Detener contador
            _closing = True
            _autoconnect = False

            'Intentar desconectar

            'CloseDisconnect()

            If _system IsNot Nothing Then
                Try
                    _system.Disconnect()
                Catch ex As Exception

                End Try
            End If

            Try
                Dim _serialPort As New SerialPort()
                _serialPort.PortName = ExData.portname
                _serialPort.Close()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Try
                picResultImage.Image = My.Resources.sin_imagen
                TextBox2.Text = "Scanner stoped"
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Try
                'Reset values
                _syncContext = Nothing
                '_ethSystemDiscoverer = Nothing
                _serSystemDiscoverer = Nothing
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Try
                CleanupConnection()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Try
                _currentResultInfoSyncLock = New Object()
                _closing = False
                _autoconnect = False
                _listAddItemLock = New Object()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Try
                _results.ClearCachedResults()
            Catch ex As Exception
                _results = Nothing
            End Try


            'Try to found 
            If activaragain Then
                _syncContext = WindowsFormsSynchronizationContext.Current

                '_serSystemDiscoverer.Dispose()

                _serSystemDiscoverer = New SerSystemDiscoverer()

                AddHandler _serSystemDiscoverer.SystemDiscovered, AddressOf OnSerSystemDiscovered


                'Cargar dispositivos
                _serSystemDiscoverer.Discover()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Delegate Sub AppendDiscover(ByVal systemInfo As SerSystemDiscoverer.SystemInfo)

    Private Sub OnSerSystemDiscoveredlist(ByVal systemInfo As SerSystemDiscoverer.SystemInfo)
        Try
            Dim system_info = systemInfo

            If system_info.Name = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.gagename Then
                ExData.portname = system_info.PortName
                If TypeOf system_info Is SerSystemDiscoverer.SystemInfo Then
                    Dim ser_system_info As SerSystemDiscoverer.SystemInfo = TryCast(system_info, SerSystemDiscoverer.SystemInfo)
                    Try
                        conn = New SerSystemConnector(ser_system_info.PortName, ser_system_info.Baudrate)
                    Catch ex As Exception

                    End Try
                    _connector = conn
                End If

                '_connector.Logger = New GuiLogger(tbLog, False, _closing)
                _system = New DataManSystem(_connector) With {
                        .DefaultTimeout = 300
                    }
                'AddHandler _system.SystemConnected, AddressOf OnSystemConnected
                'AddHandler _system.SystemDisconnected, AddressOf OnSystemDisconnected
                'AddHandler _system.SystemWentOnline, AddressOf OnSystemWentOnline
                'AddHandler _system.SystemWentOffline, AddressOf OnSystemWentOffline
                'AddHandler _system.KeepAliveResponseMissed, AddressOf OnKeepAliveResponseMissed
                'AddHandler _system.BinaryDataTransferProgress, AddressOf OnBinaryDataTransferProgress
                Dim requested_result_types As ResultTypes = ResultTypes.ReadXml Or ResultTypes.Image Or ResultTypes.ImageGraphics
                _results = New ResultCollector(_system, requested_result_types)
                AddHandler _results.ComplexResultArrived, AddressOf Results_ComplexResultArrived
                'AddHandler _results.PartialResultDropped, AddressOf Results_PartialResultDropped
                _system.SetKeepAliveOptions(False, 300, 300)
                _system.Connect()

                Try
                    _system.SetResultTypes(requested_result_types)
                    _system.SendCommand("SET LIVEIMG.MODE 0")
                    tmrCognexGage.Start()
                    '_system.BeginGetLiveImage(ImageFormat.jpeg, ImageSize.Sixteenth, ImageQuality.Medium, AddressOf OnLiveImageArrived, Nothing)
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            CleanupConnection()
        End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub OnSerSystemDiscovered(ByVal systemInfo As SerSystemDiscoverer.SystemInfo)

    Private Function GetReadStringFromResultXml(ByVal resultXml As String) As String
        Try
            Dim doc As XmlDocument = New XmlDocument()
            doc.LoadXml(resultXml)
            Dim full_string_node As XmlNode = doc.SelectSingleNode("result/general/full_string")

            If full_string_node IsNot Nothing Then
                Dim encoding As XmlAttribute = full_string_node.Attributes("encoding")

                If encoding IsNot Nothing AndAlso encoding.InnerText = "base64" Then
                    Dim code As Byte() = Convert.FromBase64String(full_string_node.InnerText)
                    Return _system.Encoding.GetString(code, 0, code.Length)
                End If

                Return full_string_node.InnerText
            End If

        Catch
        End Try

        Return ""
    End Function

    Private Sub ShowResult(ByVal e As ResultInfo)
        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty < ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_GoalQty Then
            Dim images As List(Of Image) = New List(Of Image)()
            Dim image_graphics As List(Of String) = New List(Of String)()
            Dim read_result As String = Nothing
            Dim flgReadSuccess As Boolean = False

            Me.tmrCognexGage.Stop()

            Me.tmrKeyence.Stop()

            escaneron = True

            SyncLock _currentResultInfoSyncLock
                read_result = If(Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(e.ReadString), e.ReadString, GetReadStringFromResultXml(e.XmlResult))
                If e.Image IsNot Nothing Then images.Add(e.Image)
                If e.ImageGraphics IsNot Nothing Then image_graphics.Add(e.ImageGraphics)

                If e.SubResults IsNot Nothing Then

                    For Each item In e.SubResults
                        If item.Image IsNot Nothing Then images.Add(item.Image)
                        If item.ImageGraphics IsNot Nothing Then image_graphics.Add(item.ImageGraphics)
                    Next
                End If
            End SyncLock

            If images.Count > 0 And chpreview.Checked Then
                Dim first_image As Image = images(0)
                Dim image_size As Size = Gui.FitImageInControl(first_image.Size, picResultImage.Size)
                Dim fitted_image As Image = Gui.ResizeImageToBitmap(first_image, image_size)

                If image_graphics.Count > 0 Then

                    Using g As Graphics = Graphics.FromImage(fitted_image)

                        For Each graphics In image_graphics
                            Dim rg As ResultGraphics = GraphicsResultParser.Parse(graphics, New Rectangle(0, 0, image_size.Width, image_size.Height))
                            ResultGraphicsRenderer.PaintResults(g, rg)
                        Next
                    End Using
                End If


                If picResultImage.Image IsNot Nothing Then picResultImage.Image.Dispose()
                picResultImage.Image = fitted_image
                picResultImage.Invalidate()
            ElseIf images.Count > 0 And chpreview.Checked = False Then
                If picResultImage.Image IsNot Nothing Then picResultImage.Image.Dispose()
                picResultImage.Image = My.Resources.scanning
                picResultImage.Invalidate()
            End If

            If read_result IsNot Nothing Then
                'lbReadString.Text = read_result
                If read_result = "" Then
                    TextBox2.Text = "Sin lectura"
                    TextBox2.BackColor = Color.Gray
                ElseIf serialanterior <> read_result Then
                    Me.Player2.Play()
                    'frm_Index_WAVE.Rb_pass.Checked = True
                    'frm_Index_WAVE.txt_serial.Text = read_result
                    'frm_Index_WAVE.btn_add.PerformClick()
                    txtBoxID.Text = (read_result)
                    'BtnContinue.PerformClick()
                    TextBox2.Text = txtBoxID.Text
                    TextBox2.BackColor = Color.Green
                    serialanterior = read_result
                    flgReadSuccess = True
                ElseIf serialanterior = read_result Then
                    If sounbeep = 0 Then
                        Me.Player2.Play()
                        sounbeep += 1
                    End If
                    TextBox2.Text = "Misma unidad"
                    TextBox2.BackColor = Color.Orange
                Else
                    TextBox2.Text = "No lectura"
                    TextBox2.BackColor = Color.Gray
                End If
            Else
                TextBox2.Text = "No lectura"
                TextBox2.BackColor = Color.Gray
            End If

            'tmrescaner.Start()

            If flgReadSuccess = False And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty < ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_GoalQty Then
                tmrCognexGage.Start()
            ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_CurrentQty < ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_box.Packout_GoalQty Then
                Dim ssn As String = txtBoxID.Text.Replace("'", "").ToUpper

                processsn(ssn, False)


            End If

            escaneron = False
        End If
    End Sub

        If changes_made Then

            If ExData.port_sensor_in_com_port1_in.Contains("COM") Then
                Try
                    Dim lon As String = vbCr + "LOFF" + vbCr     ' <CR>LON<CR>
                    Dim command As Byte() = ASCIIEncoding.ASCII.GetBytes(lon)
                    command(0) = bySTX      ' <STX>LON<CR>
                    command(5) = byETX      ' <STX>LON<ETX>

                    DB9_1.Write(command, 0, command.Length)

                Try

                Catch ex As Exception

                Try
                    DB9_1.Dispose()
                Catch ex As Exception

                End Try
            Else

            End If

            Try
